children.name: WhatsMyName Web
children.description: Free web-based OSINT username enumeration tool that searches for a specified username across 1500+ websites and platforms simultaneously, returning direct links to matching profiles.
children.bestFor: Quick web-based username enumeration across social media, forums, gaming platforms, and professional networks
children.output: List of sites where the username exists with direct profile links
children.opsecNote: Makes HTTP requests to each target site to check for username existence, however it does it from WhatsMyName infrastructure.

children.name: WhatsMyName (T)
children.description: OSINT project maintaining a curated JSON database of website detection patterns for username enumeration. Web interface available at whatsmyname.app.
children.bestFor: Username enumeration using community-maintained site detection data
children.output: List of sites where the username exists, based on HTTP response pattern matching
children.opsecNote: Makes HTTP requests to each target site to check for username existence.

children.name: Sylva Identity Discovery (T)
children.description: Open-source CLI tool for username and identity discovery with branch discovery to expand searches as additional linked identities are uncovered.
children.bestFor: Username enumeration with identity branching
children.output: Linked accounts and identities across platforms
children.opsecNote: Makes requests to target platforms to check username existence; external API keys may be used.

children.name: Sherlock (T)
children.description: Python CLI tool that hunts down social media accounts by username across 400+ social networks. Supports Tor routing, proxy configuration, and CSV/XLSX export.
children.bestFor: Mass username enumeration across 400+ sites
children.output: List of discovered profile URLs across social networks
children.opsecNote: Directly queries each target site to check username existence; supports Tor/proxy for anonymity.

children.name: Namechk
children.description: Web-based username and domain availability checker that searches 100+ social media platforms and 36 domain extensions simultaneously.
children.bestFor: Quick username availability check across social media and domains
children.output: Availability status across 100+ platforms and domain extensions
children.opsecNote: Searches are routed through Namechk's servers; target accounts are not directly contacted by the user.

children.name: Thats Them
children.description: Free people search engine aggregating data from 50+ sources. Supports lookups by name, address, phone number, or email.
children.bestFor: People search by name, email, phone, or address
children.input: Name, email address, phone number, or physical address
children.output: Contact info, residential details, demographics, and financial estimates
children.opsecNote: Searches are routed through ThatsThem's servers; the target is not alerted.

children.name: NameCheckup
children.description: Free web-based username and domain availability checker that searches across 20+ social media platforms and 40+ domain extensions with WHOIS lookup support.
children.bestFor: Username and domain availability checking with WHOIS info
children.output: Availability status across social platforms and domain extensions, with WHOIS data
children.opsecNote: Searches are proxied through NameCheckup's servers; no direct contact with target platforms by the user.

children.name: FootprintIQ
children.description: Ethical digital footprint scanner that searches usernames, emails, and phone numbers across 500+ platforms. Includes breach detection, data broker scanning, and confidence scoring to reduce false positives.
children.bestFor: Username and email footprint scanning with breach and data broker exposure checks
children.input: Username, email address, or phone number
children.output: Matched profiles across 500+ platforms, breach exposure, data broker listings
children.opsecNote: Queries are routed through FootprintIQ infrastructure; target platforms may log lookup activity.

children.name: GitFive (T)
children.description: OSINT CLI tool for investigating GitHub profiles. Tracks username/name history, maps emails to accounts, extracts SSH public keys, and exports findings as JSON.
children.bestFor: Deep investigation of GitHub user profiles and email-to-account mapping
children.output: Profile history, linked emails, SSH keys, repository analysis, JSON export
children.opsecNote: Queries GitHub API directly; developer recommends using a secondary GitHub account.

children.name: Sherlock
children.description: Python CLI tool that hunts down social media accounts by username across 400+ social networks. Supports Tor routing, proxy configuration, and CSV/XLSX export.
children.bestFor: Mass username enumeration across 400+ sites
children.output: List of discovered profile URLs across social networks
children.opsecNote: Directly queries each target site to check username existence; supports Tor/proxy for anonymity.

children.name: Names Directory
children.description: Searchable database of 1B+ name combinations collected from public sources. Allows bidirectional lookup to find first names by surname or surnames by first name.
children.bestFor: Finding name combinations and frequency data for a given first or last name
children.output: Associated name combinations with frequency counts
children.opsecNote: Queries a static public database; no contact with any target individual.

children.name: Lullar
children.description: Free people search and username lookup tool that searches across 148+ social media platforms including Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and LinkedIn.
children.bestFor: Social media profile discovery by username, email, or name
children.input: Email address, full name, or username
children.output: Social media profiles found across 148+ platforms
children.opsecNote: Searches are routed through Lullar's servers; no direct queries from the user to target platforms.

children.name: Amazon Usernames (M)
children.description: Google dork that searches Amazon.com for pages associated with a specific username, surfacing public profiles, wishlists, and reviews.
children.bestFor: Finding Amazon public profiles, wishlists, and review activity by username
children.output: Google search results linking to Amazon pages mentioning the username
children.opsecNote: Query goes to Google, not Amazon directly. Google may log the search but the target is not alerted.

children.name: Github User (M)
children.description: Queries the GitHub public Events API to retrieve a user's recent public activity, including pushes, pull requests, issues, and other repository events.
children.bestFor: Enumerating a GitHub user's recent public activity and repository interactions
children.output: JSON array of public events (pushes, PRs, issues, comments) with timestamps and repo details
children.opsecNote: Unauthenticated API call; GitHub rate-limits by IP (60 req/hr) but does not notify the target user.

children.name: Tinder Usernames (M)
children.description: Accesses a Tinder user's public web profile via their username. The gotinder.com domain redirects to tinder.com.
children.bestFor: Confirming existence of a Tinder profile and viewing public profile details
children.output: Public profile page with name, photo, and basic info if the user has web sharing enabled
children.opsecNote: Simple HTTP GET to a public page; target is not notified of profile views via the web URL.

children.name: Keybase
children.description: Platform for cryptographic identity verification, linking social media accounts, PGP keys, and cryptocurrency addresses to a single profile. Acquired by Zoom in 2020 but still operational.
children.bestFor: Looking up verified social accounts, PGP keys, and crypto wallets tied to a username
children.output: User profile showing verified identities across platforms, PGP keys, cryptocurrency addresses, and devices
children.opsecNote: Public profile lookups are passive web requests. No login required to view profiles.

children.name: MIT PGP Key Server
children.description: MIT PGP Public Key Server for searching, submitting, and removing PGP public keys. Look up keys by name, email, or key ID to find associated cryptographic identities.
children.bestFor: Looking up PGP public keys associated with a username or email address
children.input: Name, email address, or key ID
children.output: PGP public key data, key fingerprints, associated UIDs/email addresses, and key metadata
children.opsecNote: Public key server query; no authentication required and target is not notified of lookups.

children.name: ProtonMail users (M)
children.description: Queries ProtonMail's HKP-compatible PGP key server to look up the public key for a ProtonMail username. A successful response confirms the account exists.
children.bestFor: Confirming whether a ProtonMail username exists and retrieving its PGP public key
children.output: PGP key index with public key fingerprint, algorithm, creation timestamp, and email UID
children.opsecNote: Unauthenticated API query to ProtonMail's public key server. Target user is not notified. Enables user enumeration.

children.name: ProtonMail Domains (M)
children.description: Queries ProtonMail's HKP key server with a full email address to check for a PGP public key. Useful for identifying ProtonMail users on custom domains.
children.bestFor: Checking if an email address on a custom domain is hosted on ProtonMail
children.input: Full email address (any domain that may be hosted on ProtonMail)
children.output: PGP key index with public key fingerprint, algorithm, creation timestamp, and email UID
children.opsecNote: Unauthenticated public HKP endpoint. Target is not notified. Can reveal whether a custom domain uses ProtonMail.

children.name: Sylva Identity Discovery (T)
children.description: Identity discovery utility that searches GitHub and PGP key servers to link identities across platforms using email addresses, usernames, or PGP keys.
children.bestFor: Identity correlation via GitHub and PGP
children.output: Linked identities, GitHub profiles, PGP keys
children.opsecNote: Queries public GitHub and PGP servers without direct target contact.

children.name: ThatsThem
children.description: Reverse email lookup tool that searches a database of hundreds of millions of emails to reveal name, address, phone number, and public records associated with an email address.
children.bestFor: Reverse email lookup, person identification
children.output: Name, address, phone number, education
children.opsecNote: Queries ThatsThem's public database without alerting the target.

children.name: Hunter
children.description: Email finder and verifier that discovers business email addresses from company domains, names, and social profiles with up to 98% accuracy rate.
children.bestFor: Business email discovery, email verification
children.input: Domain name, person name, or company info
children.output: Verified business email addresses
children.opsecNote: Queries Hunter's database of public emails; does not contact targets.

children.name: Email to Address (R)
children.description: Melissa.com's data quality and verification service that validates and enriches email addresses with supplementary contact information.
children.bestFor: Email validation, address enrichment
children.output: Validated email, postal address, phone
children.opsecNote: Data verification service; does not perform reconnaissance.

children.name: VoilaNorbert
children.description: Email finder and verifier with 98% success rate that discovers business emails by company/domain, person name, or LinkedIn profile with bulk upload capability.
children.bestFor: Business email discovery, bulk email finding
children.output: Business email addresses, verification status
children.opsecNote: Searches public email database; does not contact targets directly.

children.name: GHunt (T)
children.description: Offensive Google framework that investigates Google accounts using email addresses to uncover YouTube channels, Google Photos, Maps reviews, and associated artifacts.
children.bestFor: Google account investigation, YouTube/Google Photos OSINT
children.output: YouTube channels, Google Photos, Maps reviews, device info
children.opsecNote: Requires Google login via browser extension; may be detected by Google.

children.name: OSINT Industries
children.description: Account linking service that extracts all registered accounts tied to an email or phone across 500+ platforms including social media, messaging apps, and lifestyle services.
children.bestFor: Account enumeration, breach detection, digital footprint mapping
children.input: Email address, phone number, username, or crypto wallet
children.output: Linked accounts, breach information, geospatial data, timeline
children.opsecNote: Scours public websites and databases without contacting the target.

children.name: theHarvester (T)
children.description: Command-line tool for gathering emails, subdomains, IPs, and URLs from public sources.
children.bestFor: Email harvesting, subdomain enumeration, passive recon
children.output: Email addresses, subdomains, IPs, URLs
children.opsecNote: Queries third-party search engines and APIs. Does not contact the target directly.

children.name: Infoga (T)
children.description: Python-based email OSINT tool that gathers email account information (IP, hostname, country) from search engines, PGP servers, and Shodan, with breach checking via haveibeenpwned.
children.bestFor: Early-stage email reconnaissance, information gathering
children.output: IP addresses, hostnames, country, breach status
children.opsecNote: Queries search engines and public APIs without direct target contact.

children.name: Skymem
children.description: Email finder that discovers company and personal email addresses by domain or name, with bulk search, email list creation, and advanced filtering capabilities.
children.bestFor: Email discovery by domain, bulk email list creation
children.input: Domain name or person name + domain
children.output: Email addresses, bulk email lists
children.opsecNote: Scrapes and aggregates public email data from websites and profiles.

children.name: Epieos Email Tool
children.description: Freemium OSINT tool performing email reverse lookups to uncover associated social media profiles across 120+ websites and services with breach detection.
children.bestFor: Email reverse lookup, social media profile discovery
children.output: Associated social media profiles, forum posts, breach info
children.opsecNote: Passive reconnaissance across 120+ websites; does not alert the target.

children.name: breach.vip
children.description: Free database search engine providing access to 1000+ breach databases for research, email searching, and analysis of compromised credentials.
children.bestFor: Breach database search, credential lookup
children.input: Email, domain, Discord ID, or phone number
children.output: Breach records, leaked credentials
children.opsecNote: Queries aggregated public breach databases.

children.name: Holehe (T)
children.description: Python-based email enumeration tool that checks if an email is registered across 120+ websites and services using password-reset mechanisms.
children.bestFor: Email account enumeration, service detection
children.output: List of websites where email is registered
children.opsecNote: Uses password-reset functionality without sending emails or alerting targets.

children.name: Email Format
children.description: Tool for analyzing and discovering corporate email address patterns and formats to predict valid employee email addresses within an organization.
children.bestFor: Corporate email pattern analysis, email format discovery
children.input: Sample email addresses or company info
children.output: Predicted email format patterns
children.opsecNote: Statistical analysis of publicly known email patterns.

children.name: Email Permutator
children.description: OSINT tool that generates all possible email address combinations from a person's name and domain(s) for reconnaissance and email guessing.
children.bestFor: Email pattern generation, targeted email guessing
children.output: List of possible email address variations
children.opsecNote: Generates permutations without any network contact.

children.name: Reacher Github (T)
children.description: Open-source Rust-based email verification API that checks email deliverability without sending messages, detecting catch-all and disposable addresses.
children.bestFor: Email verification, bounce detection, list cleaning
children.output: Deliverability status, MX records, bounce type
children.opsecNote: Verifies email existence through MTA queries without sending mail.

children.name: Reacher Demo
children.description: Hosted demo of the Reacher email verification API allowing free testing of email validation and deliverability checks online.
children.bestFor: Email verification testing, demonstration
children.output: Deliverability status, bounce information
children.opsecNote: Passive MTA-based verification without sending emails.

children.name: MailScrap
children.description: Email verification tool that connects to mail servers to verify mailbox existence and removes disposable email addresses from lists.
children.bestFor: Email validation, list cleaning, disposable email detection
children.output: Validation status, mailbox existence
children.opsecNote: Connects to mail servers for verification without sending messages.

children.name: Read Notify
children.description: Email tracking and read receipt service that monitors email opens and engagement, useful for confirming email validity through delivery.
children.bestFor: Email delivery confirmation, read receipt tracking
children.output: Delivery and read status
children.opsecNote: Sends tracking pixels; may alert targets to monitoring.

children.name: Email Reputation
children.description: Tool that checks email reputation, risk scoring, and breach history to identify phishing emails, compromised accounts, and risky addresses.
children.bestFor: Email reputation checking, risk assessment
children.output: Reputation score, risk level, breach history
children.opsecNote: Passive database lookup without target contact.

children.name: MailboxValidator
children.description: Email verification API that validates email deliverability, detects catch-all addresses, and provides risk scoring for bulk email list cleaning.
children.bestFor: Email validation, list cleaning, bounce prevention
children.output: Validation status, risk score, catch-all detection
children.opsecNote: Server-based verification without sending emails.

children.name: Disposable Email Domains (T)
children.description: Community-maintained blocklist of 5,000+ disposable email domains with allowlist support and multi-language implementation examples. Used by PyPI and other projects.
children.bestFor: Detecting disposable and temporary email addresses during verification
children.input: Domain name to check against the blocklist
children.output: Match result against the disposable email domain blocklist
children.opsecNote: Local list comparison; no external requests made during lookup.

children.name: Disposable Emails Registry
children.description: Searchable registry of disposable email domains with bulk download support for threat intelligence integration.
children.bestFor: Bulk blocking and threat intelligence integration for disposable email detection
children.input: Domain name or bulk list download
children.output: Match result or full disposable domain list (/list.txt)
children.opsecNote: Static list download; community-sourced submissions, no external lookups required.

children.name: Burner Email Providers (T)
children.description: Curated list of temporary email service domains with API references and detection library implementations across multiple languages.
children.bestFor: Identifying burner email providers for integration into custom investigation tools
children.output: Match result against known burner/temporary email providers
children.opsecNote: Local list comparison; MIT licensed for integration use.

children.name: Have I been pwned?
children.description: Database of breached credentials and email addresses from known data breaches.
children.bestFor: Breach detection, credential exposure checks
children.input: Email address, phone number, password hash
children.output: Breach names, breach dates, exposed data types
children.opsecNote: Queries breach database via API. Target is not notified of lookups.

children.name: Hudson Rock
children.description: Infostealer threat intelligence platform that searches a database of compromised devices and stolen credentials to identify if emails have been exposed via malware infections.
children.bestFor: Infostealer detection, breach assessment, device compromise verification
children.input: Email address, domain, username, or IP
children.output: Infostealer hits, compromised account data, breach details
children.opsecNote: Queries public infostealer database compiled from malware captures.

children.name: DeHashed (R)
children.description: Modern breach search engine indexing historical breach data over a decade old, enabling searches by email, username, password, domain, phone, and IP address.
children.bestFor: Breach searching, credential lookup, historical breach analysis
children.input: Email, username, password, domain, phone, or IP
children.output: Breach records, exposed credentials, breach dates
children.opsecNote: Searches aggregated public breach databases.

children.name: Vigilante.pw
children.description: Breach database directory and search platform raising awareness of data breaches by aggregating publicly leaked database information and breach details.
children.bestFor: Breach research, public breach database navigation
children.output: Breach records, exposed data information
children.opsecNote: Aggregates and indexes publicly disclosed breach data.

children.name: MxToolbox
children.description: Email deliverability diagnostics tool that checks MX records, SPF, DKIM, DMARC configuration, and server health to prevent email delivery issues.
children.bestFor: Email server diagnostics, deliverability testing, DNS validation
children.output: MX records, SPF/DKIM/DMARC status, blacklist info
children.opsecNote: Public DNS lookups and SMTP diagnostics without target alerting.

children.name: Domain Dossier
children.description: Free web-based tool that aggregates WHOIS, DNS, and network information for domains and IP addresses into a single consolidated report.
children.bestFor: Quick domain and IP reconnaissance with DNS and WHOIS data
children.output: WHOIS records, DNS records, IP information, registration details
children.opsecNote: Queries public WHOIS and DNS records; does not contact the target domain directly.

children.name: domainIQ
children.description: Comprehensive domain intelligence platform offering reverse lookups, ownership history, and related domain discovery. Trusted by government agencies, domain investors, and legal firms.
children.bestFor: Domain ownership history, reverse analytics lookup, competitor domain research
children.output: Domain owner information, historical ownership, similar domains, analytics data, reverse MX/IP/DNS lookups
children.opsecNote: Queries aggregated domain data; does not probe the target directly.

children.name: DomainTools Whois
children.description: Enterprise-grade WHOIS API with decades of historical domain data and rapid query response. The industry leader for threat intelligence and domain tracking.
children.bestFor: Historical WHOIS research, threat actor tracking, enterprise domain intelligence
children.output: Current and historical WHOIS records, registrant details, hosting history
children.opsecNote: Queries cached WHOIS data; no direct contact with target infrastructure.

children.name: SWITCH Internet Domains Whois (.ch)
children.description: Official Swiss domain registry WHOIS lookup service operated by SWITCH for .ch and .li country-code domains. Public registry with all owner contact details visible.
children.bestFor: .ch and .li domain ownership research, Swiss Internet infrastructure lookup
children.output: Registrant contact details, creation/expiry dates, nameservers, registration status
children.opsecNote: Queries the official SWITCH registry database; does not probe the target.

children.name: Whoisology
children.description: Searchable archive of billions of current and historical domain WHOIS records with cross-referencing capabilities. Designed for InfoSec, legal, and research professionals.
children.bestFor: Historical domain ownership, reverse WHOIS lookups, domain connection tracking
children.output: Historical WHOIS records, ownership changes, registrant information across domains
children.opsecNote: Accesses archived WHOIS data; no direct probing of target domains.

children.name: Whois ARIN
children.description: Official American Registry for Internet Numbers WHOIS and RDAP lookup service for IPv4, IPv6, ASNs, and organizations in the North American region.
children.bestFor: IP address and ASN registration data, North American internet resource tracking
children.input: IP address, ASN, organization name, contact information
children.output: IP ownership, organization details, Points of Contact (POCs), ASN information
children.opsecNote: Queries official ARIN database; does not contact targets or perform active scanning.

children.name: DNSstuff
children.description: Suite of free DNS and network tools providing lookups, DNS checks, and WHOIS information for domain reconnaissance.
children.bestFor: Quick DNS and WHOIS lookups, network diagnostics
children.output: DNS records, WHOIS data, DNS propagation checks, nameserver information
children.opsecNote: Queries public DNS and WHOIS servers; does not probe target infrastructure.

children.name: Robtex (R)
children.description: Comprehensive free DNS lookup and network intelligence tool with decade-spanning database containing billions of documents of internet data. Useful for forensics and threat actor tracking.
children.bestFor: DNS reconnaissance, IP and domain relationship mapping, historical internet data lookup
children.input: Domain name, IP address, hostname, autonomous system
children.output: DNS records, IP information, SEO data, reputation scores, historical relationships
children.opsecNote: Searches historical and cached DNS data; does not perform active probing.

children.name: Domaincrawler.com
children.description: Enterprise-grade domain database covering 1.4+ billion registered and unregistered domains with 80+ billion historical records since 2008. Used by brand protection and OSINT professionals.
children.bestFor: Large-scale domain research, brand protection monitoring, zone file analysis, market intelligence
children.input: Domain name, DNS data, technology stack filters
children.output: Domain metadata, DNS configuration, SSL certificates, technology stack, ownership connections, historical data
children.opsecNote: Queries aggregated domain database updated every 7 days; no active scanning of targets.

children.name: MarkMonitor Whois Search
children.description: ICANN-accredited registrar and brand protection company offering WHOIS lookup and domain management services. Exclusively serves corporate clients including major global brands.
children.bestFor: Corporate domain portfolio management, brand protection, trademark monitoring
children.output: WHOIS records, registration data, brand portfolio information
children.opsecNote: Accesses standard WHOIS records through registered domain lookups; no direct target probing.

children.name: easyWhois
children.description: Free domain WHOIS lookup and DNS tools service. Now operated under the DomainHelp platform, providing domain registration information and DNS lookups.
children.bestFor: Quick domain WHOIS lookups and DNS checks
children.output: WHOIS records, DNS information, registrant details, nameservers
children.opsecNote: Queries public WHOIS and DNS data; does not contact the target domain.

children.name: Website Informer
children.description: Free domain and website information aggregator providing visitor statistics, safety status, Alexa rankings, ownership data, and technical details about websites.
children.bestFor: Website profiling, ownership verification, traffic estimation, technical stack discovery
children.output: Visitor statistics, safety ratings, domain owner information, technology stack, Alexa rank, historical snapshots
children.opsecNote: Aggregates public website data and statistics; does not contact the target infrastructure.

children.name: Who.is
children.description: Comprehensive WHOIS and RDAP lookup service with large database of domain registration, DNS records, and IP information. Provides both current and historical data.
children.bestFor: Domain registration research, WHOIS lookups, RDAP queries, IP tracking
children.output: WHOIS records, RDAP data, DNS records, nameservers, registrant information
children.opsecNote: Queries public WHOIS and RDAP databases; does not perform active scanning.

children.name: Whois AMPed
children.description: Mobile-optimized WHOIS lookup service accessible via web interface for domain registration information and WHOIS queries.
children.bestFor: Mobile-friendly WHOIS lookups, quick domain information retrieval
children.output: WHOIS records, domain registration information, registrant details
children.opsecNote: Accesses public WHOIS data; no target probing or direct contact.

children.name: ViewDNS.info
children.description: Comprehensive DNS lookup and WHOIS service providing detailed DNS records, reverse IP lookups, reverse WHOIS searches, and API access for automated queries.
children.bestFor: DNS reconnaissance, reverse IP and reverse WHOIS lookups, historical DNS tracking
children.input: Domain name, IP address, registrant name/email, nameserver
children.output: DNS records, WHOIS information, reverse lookups, IP hosting, historical DNS changes
children.opsecNote: Queries public DNS and WHOIS data; does not perform active probing of targets.

children.name: Daily DNS Changes
children.description: DomainTools service monitoring DNS record changes across domains, detecting newly registered subdomains and tracking DNS infrastructure modifications.
children.bestFor: DNS change detection, subdomain discovery, infrastructure monitoring
children.output: New DNS records, nameserver changes, subdomain discoveries, historical DNS changes
children.opsecNote: Monitors public DNS records for changes; no active scanning or direct contact.

children.name: IP2WHOIS
children.description: Free WHOIS lookup service for domain names and IP addresses, providing registration details, registrant information, location data, and API access.
children.bestFor: Domain and IP WHOIS lookups, registrant research
children.output: WHOIS records, registrant details, location information, registration dates
children.opsecNote: Queries public WHOIS databases; does not contact the target.

children.name: Netlas.io
children.description: Comprehensive internet-wide scanning and OSINT platform providing DNS, WHOIS, SSL, and network reconnaissance with attack surface discovery capabilities.
children.bestFor: Internet reconnaissance, DNS and WHOIS lookups, attack surface discovery, vulnerability research
children.input: Domain name, IP address, ASN, DNS records
children.output: DNS records, WHOIS data, open ports, SSL certificates, service information, historical data
children.opsecNote: Queries cached internet scanning data; free tier available with 50 daily requests.

children.name: SynapsInt
children.description: Unified web-based OSINT research platform supporting domain, IP, SSL, analytics, email, phone, and social media lookups with subdomain enumeration.
children.bestFor: Unified OSINT research, subdomain discovery, multi-vector intelligence gathering
children.input: Domain, IP, email, phone, username, CVE ID
children.output: Subdomains, DNS records, WHOIS data, open ports, vulnerabilities, social media accounts, historical data
children.opsecNote: Aggregates publicly available information from multiple sources; no direct target contact.

children.name: Aquatone (T)
children.description: Go-based tool for domain reconnaissance that automates subdomain discovery, HTTP service scanning, screenshot capture, and visual HTML report generation for attack surface analysis.
children.bestFor: Visual subdomain reconnaissance, HTTP service discovery, attack surface mapping
children.output: Discovered subdomains, open ports, HTTP screenshots, consolidated reconnaissance report
children.opsecNote: Makes HTTP requests to discovered hosts to capture screenshots and fingerprint services; supports integration with passive enumeration tools.

children.name: FindSubDomains
children.description: Free web-based automated subdomain discovery tool with filtering and analysis capabilities, showing organization names, relationships, and top subdomain statistics.
children.bestFor: Automated subdomain enumeration, organization name filtering, subdomain statistics
children.output: Discovered subdomains, organization associations, popularity metrics, filtering options
children.opsecNote: Uses passive DNS and search-based methods for subdomain discovery; no active probing.

children.name: Google Subdomains (D)
children.description: Google Dork technique using the 'site:' operator to enumerate subdomains of a target domain via Google's search index.
children.bestFor: Indexed subdomain discovery, publicly visible subdomain enumeration
children.input: Domain name (as Google Dork syntax: site:domain.com)
children.output: Indexed subdomains and pages from Google search results
children.opsecNote: Uses Google's search index; no direct contact with the target domain.

children.name: Recon-ng (T)
children.description: Full-featured web reconnaissance framework with independent modules for data gathering.
children.bestFor: Modular web recon, API-driven data collection
children.output: Contacts, hosts, credentials, ports via module-specific results
children.opsecNote: Queries third-party APIs and data sources. Does not probe the target unless specific modules are configured to do so.

children.name: XRay
children.description: Go-based network reconnaissance tool that automates subdomain enumeration via DNS brute force, integrates Shodan for port discovery, and gathers banner information with web UI visualization.
children.bestFor: Automated subdomain discovery with banner grabbing, open port enumeration, Shodan integration
children.input: Domain name, subdomain wordlist, Shodan API key (optional), ViewDNS API key (optional)
children.output: Enumerated subdomains, open ports, banner information, historical data, web-based results UI
children.opsecNote: Performs DNS brute force for subdomain enumeration and makes banner grabbing connections to discovered services.

children.name: DNS Recon (T)
children.description: Python-based DNS enumeration script supporting zone transfers, standard record enumeration, TLD expansion, DNS brute force, and PTR lookups.
children.bestFor: DNS enumeration, zone transfer testing, subdomain brute forcing, DNS security assessment
children.input: Domain name, IP range/CIDR, subdomain wordlist, DNS server address
children.output: NS/SOA/MX/A records, discovered subdomains, zone transfer results, PTR records, wildcard resolution status
children.opsecNote: Performs active DNS queries and brute force attempts; does not probe target services directly but makes repeated DNS requests.

children.name: Gobuster (T)
children.description: Multi-mode brute-force tool for DNS subdomain, virtual host, and directory discovery.
children.bestFor: Fast DNS and vhost brute-force enumeration
children.input: Domain, wordlist, and optional resolver/thread settings
children.output: Discovered subdomains, vhosts, or directories with response details
children.opsecNote: Sends direct DNS/HTTP probes and can generate noisy traffic patterns.

children.name: Fierce Domain Scanner (T)
children.description: DNS reconnaissance tool focused on subdomain discovery and non-contiguous IP space mapping.
children.bestFor: DNS recon and subdomain-to-IP mapping
children.input: Domain, DNS server options, and optional wordlist/range parameters
children.output: Subdomains, resolved IPs, and DNS reconnaissance findings

children.name: OWASP Maryam (T)

children.name: theHarvester (T)

children.description: IP reputation and threat intelligence service analyzing blacklist status and security risks.
children.bestFor: Check IP reputation and blacklist status
children.output: Threat score, blacklist status, reports
children.opsecNote: Passive reputation lookup; account needed for full data.

children.name: ExoneraTor
children.description: Tool for checking if an IP address belonged to Tor at a specific date.
children.bestFor: Verify Tor relay membership by date
children.output: Tor exit/entry node status confirmation
children.opsecNote: Passive historical Tor relay lookup from public archives.

children.name: Grey Noise
children.description: Platform for analyzing internet background noise and identifying benign scanning activity.
children.bestFor: Distinguish malicious from benign internet activity
children.output: Classification, scanner type, threat assessment
children.opsecNote: Passive threat intelligence; free tier available.

children.name: Blocklist.de
children.description: Community-contributed blocklist of IP addresses involved in attacks and malicious activity.
children.bestFor: Check IP blacklist status
children.output: Blacklist status, attack types logged
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of community blocklist.

children.name: DShield API
children.description: API and database of security events and IPs involved in attacks monitored by SANS.
children.bestFor: Query IPs involved in attacks
children.output: Attack reports, threat activity
children.opsecNote: Passive threat intelligence from SANS monitored networks.

children.name: FireHOL IP Lists
children.description: Collection of firewall-friendly IP lists for blocking malicious and spam sources.
children.bestFor: Block malicious/spam IP sources
children.output: Blacklist membership status
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of public IP reputation lists.

children.name: Project Honey Pot
children.description: Global honeypot network collecting spam and attack data with IP reputation service.
children.bestFor: Check IP for spam and attack history
children.output: Threat score, spam reports, attack activity
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of honeypot-collected threat data.

children.name: IP Fingerprints - Reverse IP Lookup
children.description: Find all domains hosted on a shared IP address through reverse IP lookup.
children.bestFor: Find domains on shared hosting
children.output: List of domains on IP
children.opsecNote: Passive DNS reverse lookup.

children.name: Bing IP Search (D)
children.description: Bing search operator for finding domains and subdomains hosted on a specific IP address.
children.bestFor: Find domains on IP using Bing index
children.output: Domains indexed by Bing on that IP
children.opsecNote: Passive search using Bing's public index.

children.name: TCP/IP Utils - Domain Neighbors
children.description: Find all domains on the same IP and subdomain information via reverse IP lookups.
children.bestFor: Identify related domains on same IP
children.output: Neighbor domains, IP info
children.opsecNote: Passive DNS and IP lookup data.

children.name: MyIPNeighbors
children.description: Reverse IP lookup tool for discovering all domains and subdomains on an IP address.
children.bestFor: Find all domains on same shared IP
children.output: List of domains on IP, subdomains
children.opsecNote: Passive DNS reverse lookup.

children.name: CloudFlare Watch
children.description: Tool for identifying and analyzing websites protected by Cloudflare's CDN and security services.
children.bestFor: Identify Cloudflare-protected sites
children.output: Cloudflare status, origin IP (if discoverable)
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of Cloudflare configurations.

children.name: CloudFail (T)
children.description: Tool for finding origin IPs of Cloudflare-protected websites through enumeration techniques.
children.bestFor: Bypass Cloudflare to find origin IP
children.output: Origin IP address (if discoverable)
children.opsecNote: Uses active enumeration and DNS history techniques.

children.name: WiGLE: Wireless Network Mapping
children.description: Global database of wireless networks (WiFi, Bluetooth, cellular) with mapping and signal strength data.
children.bestFor: Map wireless networks and find signal coverage
children.output: Network locations, signal maps, network details
children.opsecNote: Crowdsourced wireless network data; passive lookup.

children.name: OpenCellid: Database of Cell Towers
children.description: Open database of cellular tower locations and coverage for mobile network geolocation.
children.bestFor: Find cellular tower locations and coverage
children.output: Tower coordinates, operator, coverage area
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of public cellular network data.

children.name: Wireshark
children.description: Open-source network packet analyzer for deep packet inspection and network troubleshooting.
children.bestFor: Network packet analysis and protocol debugging
children.output: Detailed packet analysis, protocol breakdown
children.opsecNote: Tool-dependent; passive capture or active sniffing possible.

children.name: NetworkMiner
children.description: Passive network forensics tool for extracting files and data from network traffic captures.
children.bestFor: Network forensics and file extraction from traffic
children.output: Extracted files, metadata, network sessions
children.opsecNote: Passive analysis of already-captured traffic.

children.name: Packet Total
children.description: Online platform for uploading and analyzing network packet captures (PCAP files).
children.bestFor: Cloud-based network forensics analysis
children.output: Traffic analysis, threat indicators, IoCs
children.opsecNote: Passive analysis of PCAP; consider privacy of uploaded data.

children.name: checkip (T)
children.description: Command-line utility for checking local machine IP address and network connectivity.
children.bestFor: Display local IP and network info
children.output: Local IP, gateway, DNS servers
children.opsecNote: Passive system utility; local only.

children.name: Ki.tc
children.description: IP logging service that generates trackable links for IP/browser info collection.
children.bestFor: Generate trackable links to log visitor IPs
children.output: Tracker link, IP logs, browser info
children.opsecNote: Creates tracking mechanism; detection depends on how link is used.

children.name: Grabify
children.description: URL shortener service that logs IP addresses and device information of link clickers.
children.bestFor: Shorten URLs and log visitor IPs
children.output: Short URL with IP logging
children.opsecNote: Creates tracking link; malicious uses common.

children.name: IP Logger
children.description: IP logging and URL shortening service tracking visitor IP, location, and browser data.
children.bestFor: Track visitor IPs through shortened links
children.output: Logging URL, visitor IP/location data
children.opsecNote: Tracking service; ethical and legal concerns apply.

children.name: Google Images
children.description: Google's reverse image and visual search via Lens for finding matches, source pages, and related images across the web.
children.bestFor: Broad reverse image search and source discovery
children.output: Visually similar images, matching pages, and indexed source sites

children.name: Bing Images
children.description: Microsoft visual search engine with reverse image lookup and crop-based matching for partial-object analysis.
children.bestFor: Cropped reverse-image matching and visual component analysis

children.output: Matching images, related pages, and object-level visual matches
children.opsecNote: Performs web search queries without direct interaction with target identities.

children.name: FaceCheck Facial Recognition Search
children.description: Facial recognition search engine that finds publicly indexed face matches across web and social sources.
children.bestFor: Finding public social profiles by face image

children.opsecNote: Uploads target imagery to a third-party face-search service; treat as active collection.

children.name: Surfface Face & People Search Engine
children.description: AI-based face and people search platform focused on open-source identity discovery and correlation.

children.opsecNote: Submits facial data to vendor infrastructure for matching against indexed sources.

children.name: PimEyes Face Search Engine
children.description: Commercial reverse face search engine for locating appearances of a face on publicly indexed websites.
children.bestFor: High-coverage reverse face search investigations
children.output: Matched face thumbnails and source-page links
children.opsecNote: Face image is uploaded and processed by a third-party biometric search provider.

children.name: Yandex Images
children.description: Reverse image search engine with strong matching for Eastern European and Asian web sources.
children.bestFor: Finding non-Western image sources and modified variants
children.output: Similar images, likely originals, and source webpages
children.opsecNote: Standard search requests to Yandex index; no direct account interaction required.

children.name: Baidu Images
children.description: Chinese reverse image search platform useful for discovering image reuse on China-centric websites.
children.bestFor: China-specific image source discovery
children.output: Visually similar images from Chinese websites and platforms
children.opsecNote: Queries Baidu index only; no direct contact with target entities.

children.name: Twitter Image Search (M)
children.description: Manual X/Twitter query template for finding tweets containing images for a target keyword or account.
children.bestFor: Finding image-containing tweets by keyword or operator
children.input: Edited URL query (keyword, account, and search operators)
children.output: Tweets and accounts with matching image/media posts
children.opsecNote: Searches public timeline content; no direct engagement with targets.

children.name: Imgur Search
children.description: Search interface for Imgur-hosted public images, albums, and community media posts.
children.bestFor: Locating reposted images and public gallery content on Imgur
children.output: Public image posts, albums, and account-linked media results
children.opsecNote: Uses public site search and does not directly contact targets.

children.name: Photobucket
children.description: Long-running image hosting platform with public galleries and legacy web-hosted photo content.
children.bestFor: Finding legacy hosted images and user gallery artifacts
children.output: Public image galleries and hosted photo assets
children.opsecNote: Investigations remain on public gallery pages and search views.

children.name: 7Photos.net
children.description: Unclear image-related web service with an active domain but limited publicly verifiable functionality.
children.bestFor: Unknown; requires additional validation before operational use
children.output: Unclear due to gated/redirected workflow
children.opsecNote: Observed authentication-style redirect behavior; service behavior is not fully observable.

children.name: Current Location
children.description: Location-based photo discovery tool that aggregates geotagged images from public platforms on an interactive map.
children.bestFor: Discovering geotagged photos near a location of interest
children.input: Map location, coordinates, or browser geolocation
children.output: Geotagged image results with source context from supported platforms
children.opsecNote: Queries publicly indexed geotagged photos; no direct interaction with uploaders.

children.name: Lenso.ai
children.description: AI reverse image and face matching platform designed to find similar or edited visual content.
children.bestFor: Matching altered or low-quality images and face lookups
children.output: Visual matches, related occurrences, and similarity-ranked results
children.opsecNote: Uploads target imagery to external AI service for analysis and indexing.

children.name: CC Search
children.description: Creative Commons search portal for discovering openly licensed and public-domain images.
children.bestFor: Finding license-safe imagery and attribution-ready sources
children.output: CC/public-domain image results across partner collections
children.opsecNote: Aggregated search over open repositories with no target interaction.

children.name: CamFind App
children.description: Mobile visual search app that identifies objects, landmarks, and products from photos.
children.bestFor: On-device object identification and quick visual lookups
children.output: Object labels, related images, and linked web results
children.opsecNote: Uploads captured images to remote processing service for recognition.

children.name: RevEye Reverse Image Search (T)
children.description: Open-source browser extension that launches reverse image searches across multiple engines from one menu.
children.bestFor: Multi-engine reverse image pivoting from a single browser action
children.output: Parallel reverse-search results in configured engines
children.opsecNote: Client-side extension submits search queries to selected engines only.

children.name: SmugMug Search
children.description: Photo hosting and portfolio platform with searchable public galleries and photographer profiles.
children.bestFor: Finding public photographer portfolios and gallery artifacts
children.output: Public albums, image sets, and profile-linked photo collections
children.opsecNote: Research is limited to publicly exposed gallery content.

children.name: ImageNet
children.description: Large-scale labeled image dataset used for computer vision and image classification research.
children.bestFor: Reference classification sets and ML-oriented visual taxonomy work

children.opsecNote: Academic dataset access with no direct subject engagement.

children.name: Places2
children.description: MIT CSAIL scene-recognition dataset containing millions of place-labeled images for visual analysis.
children.bestFor: Scene classification reference and location-context model training
children.input: Scene categories and dataset download requests
children.output: Scene-labeled image datasets and related research resources
children.opsecNote: Public academic dataset access; no direct target interaction.

children.name: Image Identification Project
children.description: Online image recognition service that labels uploaded images with machine-generated tags and confidence scores.
children.bestFor: Quick machine-labeling of unknown image content
children.output: Predicted tags, object labels, and confidence values
children.opsecNote: Uploaded images are processed on third-party infrastructure.

children.name: SauceNAO
children.description: Reverse image source finder widely used to trace artwork, anime frames, and reposted media to origin sites.
children.bestFor: Tracing image origins and duplicate postings
children.output: Likely source links, matching images, and similarity metrics
children.opsecNote: Search workflow only; does not interact with target accounts directly.

children.name: Picarta
children.description: AI geolocation tool that estimates likely photo capture locations from visual scene analysis.
children.bestFor: Estimating geographic origin of photos without metadata
children.output: Predicted coordinates and location confidence cues
children.opsecNote: Image content is uploaded to a third-party AI geolocation service.

children.name: FaceSeek Face Search Engine
children.description: Face-matching web tool for locating visually similar faces across indexed online content.
children.bestFor: Supplemental reverse face lookup and comparison
children.output: Potential facial matches with source references
children.opsecNote: Uploads biometric imagery to a hosted face-search platform.

children.name: Webstigram
children.description: Legacy Webstagram endpoint historically used for Instagram search workflows; currently not verifiable as a standalone active OSINT tool.
children.bestFor: Historical reference while migrating to active Instagram tooling
children.output: Unreliable/limited Instagram lookup results
children.opsecNote: Tool status is unclear and behavior is inconsistent; validate with alternative tools before operational use.

children.name: Instagram
children.description: Main Instagram platform used for public profile, hashtag, and location OSINT collection.
children.bestFor: Social profiling and image discovery
children.output: Profiles, posts, location signals, and network context
children.opsecNote: Viewing public content is low-friction, but platform telemetry and account controls still apply.

children.name: Mini Instagram
children.description: Lightweight Instagram client utility used to simplify media viewing and downloading workflows.

children.description: Image download utility family used for saving individual or batch media from web pages.

children.name: Tofo.me

children.output: Unclear or inconsistent output

children.name: Flickr
children.description: Photo hosting platform that often preserves useful image metadata and geotags for OSINT workflows.

children.name: ExifEditor

children.name: ExifViewer
children.description: Online EXIF inspection utility for camera, location, and embedded image metadata fields.
children.bestFor: Quick EXIF inspection without local CLI tools
children.input: Image file uploads or image URLs
children.output: Human-readable EXIF and geolocation data
children.opsecNote: Uploads may route through third-party infrastructure depending on deployment.

children.name: FOCA (T)
children.description: Desktop reconnaissance tool that gathers public documents from target domains and extracts embedded metadata.
children.bestFor: Corporate document metadata reconnaissance
children.output: Extracted usernames, paths, software fingerprints, and document metadata

children.name: GeoSetter
children.description: Windows desktop utility for viewing and editing photo geotags and EXIF/XMP metadata fields in bulk.

children.name: Jeffrey's Exif Viewer

children.name: JPEGsnoop (T)
children.description: Windows forensic utility for deep JPEG structure analysis, recompression detection, and authenticity clues.
children.bestFor: JPEG forensic analysis and tamper signal detection
children.output: Compression signatures, structure details, and edit indicators
children.opsecNote: Local forensic analysis with no inherent outbound activity.

children.name: Metapicz
children.description: Online EXIF parser historically used for quick camera and location metadata reads, now showing signs of limited maintenance.
children.bestFor: Legacy metadata checks when primary tools are unavailable
children.output: Formatted EXIF metadata when service is functioning
children.opsecNote: Reliability appears inconsistent; verify findings with maintained alternatives.

children.name: Search by Exif
children.description: Web EXIF inspection tool focused on extracting metadata and GPS clues from supplied images.
children.bestFor: Rapid EXIF and geolocation extraction
children.output: EXIF metadata with location-relevant fields
children.opsecNote: Web-hosted processing can expose uploads to third-party infrastructure.

children.name: xeuledoc - Fetch metadata about any public Google document
children.description: Python tool that extracts metadata from public Google Docs, Sheets, and Slides links.
children.bestFor: Google document attribution and metadata extraction
children.output: Owner identifiers, account metadata, and document context
children.opsecNote: Reads only public docs without authentication bypass, but still queries Google infrastructure.

children.name: Exiv2 (T)
children.description: Cross-platform library and CLI for reading and modifying EXIF, IPTC, XMP, and ICC metadata.
children.bestFor: Programmatic metadata parsing and editing pipelines
children.output: Metadata dumps and optional metadata writes
children.opsecNote: Read operations are passive; write actions alter evidence files.

children.name: MediaInfo (T)
children.description: Cross-platform utility for extracting technical metadata from video and audio media files.
children.bestFor: Media codec and container metadata profiling
children.output: Codec, bitrate, duration, stream, and tag metadata
children.opsecNote: Local analysis utility with no required outbound collection.

children.name: Apache Tika (T)
children.description: Apache content analysis framework for extracting metadata and text across a very broad set of file formats.
children.bestFor: Scalable metadata extraction across heterogeneous document sets
children.input: Documents, archives, media, and structured file types
children.output: Normalized metadata fields and extracted text content
children.opsecNote: Operational exposure depends on deployment mode (local vs server-based processing).

children.name: oletools (T)
children.description: Python toolkit for analyzing OLE and Office documents, including macro extraction and suspicious object detection.
children.bestFor: Office document security triage and embedded code inspection
children.output: Macro code, suspicious indicators, embedded object details, and metadata
children.opsecNote: Malicious samples can trigger security tooling; run analysis in isolated environments.

children.name: What Font Is

children.description: Facebook public search pattern used to test whether an email identifier resolves to matching profiles. Useful for quick account existence checks with manually edited query values.

children.name: Recover FB Account

children.name: Facebook Photos by ID (M)
children.description: Direct Facebook photo permalink format that retrieves a specific image when the photo ID is known.

children.output: Direct Facebook photo page for the supplied photo ID

children.name: FB Lookup ID
children.description: Web utility that resolves Facebook profile, page, or group URLs into numeric Facebook IDs for downstream investigation tools.

children.name: FB Identify (Requires Logout)

children.name: Masto (T)

children.name: Inflact Instagram Viewer (Anonymous)

children.name: Osintgram (T)

children.name: Twitter Advanced Search
children.description: Built-in X/Twitter advanced search interface supporting operator-based filtering for users, terms, dates, and engagement constraints.

children.output: Filtered tweet result set matching the applied criteria

children.description: Operator-based X/Twitter search workflow for geotagged content using `geocode:` and location-focused query parameters.

children.output: Tweets matching the configured location filter

children.name: Twitter Date Search
children.description: Date-bounded X/Twitter search pattern using `since:` and `until:` operators to isolate tweets in a specific time window.

children.name: Followerwonk (R)

children.name: Twopcharts

children.name: TweeterID

children.name: Tweepsect
children.description: Former Twitter overlap analysis tool for intersecting followers and following lists between accounts; no longer operational under current API limits.
