children.name: Twitonomy
children.description: Twitter analytics platform for profile activity, hashtag usage, and follower/following behavior over time.
children.bestFor: Profile-level Twitter analytics and behavior baselining
children.output: Activity timelines, hashtag/topic frequency, and account-level analytics
children.opsecNote: Requires third-party platform access and may prompt X/Twitter sign-in for full features.

children.name: Foller.me Analytics
children.description: Web analytics tool for summarizing public Twitter profile behavior, including hashtags, mentions, topics, and activity cadence.
children.bestFor: Quick baseline profiling of a Twitter account
children.output: Follower counts, topic and hashtag summaries, posting-time patterns, and account metadata
children.opsecNote: Queries publicly visible profile data through a third-party interface.

children.name: X0rz Tweets_analyzer (T)
children.description: Python CLI analyzer for profiling Twitter user behavior, including posting rhythm, language distribution, and source-client usage.
children.bestFor: Behavioral profiling and temporal analysis of Twitter accounts
children.output: Activity charts, language/source statistics, and account behavior indicators
children.opsecNote: Requires API-driven collection and can expose investigator infrastructure through API usage patterns.

children.name: RiteTag
children.description: Hashtag intelligence platform that scores and recommends social tags based on trend velocity and engagement potential.
children.bestFor: Hashtag trend analysis and campaign tag selection
children.input: Keywords, draft text, or media captions
children.output: Suggested hashtags with trend and visibility indicators
children.opsecNote: Processes submitted content on third-party infrastructure for analytics.

children.name: TAGSExplorer
children.description: Browser-based visualization layer for TAGS archives that maps mentions, replies, and retweet relationships from collected Twitter datasets.
children.bestFor: Conversation network mapping from archived Twitter data
children.input: Google Sheets data produced by TAGS collection workflows
children.output: Interactive network graph and conversation summaries
children.opsecNote: Works on previously collected datasets; no direct contact with target accounts during analysis.

children.name: Tweet Metadata
children.description: Reference document and workflow aid for interpreting metadata fields embedded in tweet payloads and exports.
children.bestFor: Understanding tweet metadata fields for forensic analysis
children.input: Tweet JSON/export data and metadata field references
children.output: Field-level interpretation guidance for tweet metadata
children.opsecNote: Documentation resource only; does not query live targets directly.

children.name: Birdwatcher (T)
children.description: Open-source Twitter data harvesting and analysis framework for collecting tweets and producing offline analytical artifacts.
children.bestFor: Local collection and analysis of Twitter datasets at scale
children.input: Twitter account targets and API configuration
children.output: Collected tweets, relationship data, and analysis-ready exports (including geospatial artifacts)
children.opsecNote: Performs direct API/data collection activity from investigator infrastructure.

children.name: Tinfoleak Web
children.description: Web-based platform for Twitter/X intelligence analysis, user profiling, and geolocation-oriented review of public activity.
children.bestFor: Twitter profile and timeline intelligence
children.output: Profile details, tweet history views, and account activity context
children.opsecNote: Queries are sent to third-party service infrastructure and may be logged.

children.name: Tinfoleak.py (T)
children.description: Python command-line tool for collecting Twitter/X account intelligence and metadata from target profiles.
children.bestFor: CLI-based Twitter metadata collection
children.output: User profile metadata and related account intelligence artifacts
children.opsecNote: Direct requests to platform endpoints expose source IP and request patterns.

children.name: DMI-TCAT (T)
children.description: Twitter Capture and Analysis Toolset for collecting and analyzing Twitter datasets using self-hosted infrastructure.
children.bestFor: Large-scale Twitter collection and analysis
children.input: API credentials plus search terms, handles, or tracking filters
children.output: Stored tweet datasets, exports, and analysis-ready records
children.opsecNote: Requires authenticated API collection and self-hosted data processing.

children.name: Twint (T)
children.description: Open-source Twitter scraping utility for collecting public tweet and user data without official API usage.
children.bestFor: Historical Twitter scraping without API keys
children.input: Handles, keywords, hashtags, and date filters
children.output: Tweet collections, user metadata, and exportable structured results
children.opsecNote: Scraping activity can be detected and blocked by the target platform.

children.name: GeoSocial Footprint
children.description: Geolocation-focused social media analysis service for mapping public location traces and movement patterns.
children.bestFor: Location and movement pattern analysis
children.input: Public social identifiers and geotagged content references
children.output: Mapped points, movement timelines, and location summaries
children.opsecNote: Use may be logged by the provider and linked to investigator activity.

children.name: One Million Tweet Map
children.description: Interactive map for viewing recent geolocated tweets and filtering by keyword and region.
children.bestFor: Real-time geolocated tweet monitoring
children.input: Keyword, map area, and time filters
children.output: Mapped tweet locations with associated post content
children.opsecNote: Read-only web usage with no direct target interaction required.

children.name: Creepy (T)
children.description: Desktop geolocation intelligence tool aggregating public geotagged data from supported social sources.
children.bestFor: Cross-platform geolocation aggregation
children.input: Usernames and supported social platform account identifiers
children.output: Location points, maps, and metadata for linked accounts
children.opsecNote: Tool pulls remote platform data and can generate identifiable request traffic.

children.name: Fedica
children.description: Social analytics platform with audience and engagement insights across multiple social networks.
children.bestFor: Cross-platform social analytics and tracking
children.input: Connected social accounts or profile targets
children.output: Engagement metrics, trend data, and audience analytics
children.opsecNote: Platform usage and connected account actions are visible to service provider logs.

children.name: All My Tweets
children.description: Twitter/X account history viewer for reviewing public tweet timelines in a single interface.
children.bestFor: Quick review of tweet history
children.output: Chronological list of public tweets and profile activity
children.opsecNote: Uses third-party web service access that can be logged by provider systems.

children.name: Spoonbill
children.description: Service that tracks Twitter/X profile changes such as bios, names, and avatars over time.
children.bestFor: Monitoring profile change history
children.output: Historical profile snapshots and change alerts
children.opsecNote: Monitoring is indirect; investigator does not directly engage target accounts.

children.name: TweetVacuum (T)
children.description: Tool for extracting larger Twitter/X timeline archives beyond default on-platform browsing constraints.
children.bestFor: Expanded tweet history export
children.output: Archived tweet records in local export formats
children.opsecNote: Collection patterns may be visible through account- or IP-linked activity.

children.name: Reddit Metis
children.description: Reddit user analyzer summarizing posting behavior, language patterns, and subreddit activity.
children.bestFor: Reddit user behavior profiling
children.output: Account statistics, subreddit distribution, and content summaries
children.opsecNote: Reads public Reddit data without direct interaction with target users.

children.name: Reddit Archive
children.description: Archive-oriented Reddit lookup resource for historical post and comment discovery workflows.
children.bestFor: Historical Reddit content lookup
children.input: Subreddit names, usernames, and keyword queries
children.output: Archived post and comment references from historical datasets
children.opsecNote: Read-only archive queries; availability may vary with backend data sources.

children.name: subreddits
children.description: Subreddit discovery index for identifying communities by topic and interest area.
children.bestFor: Topic-based subreddit discovery
children.output: Lists of relevant subreddits and navigation paths
children.opsecNote: Public index browsing with no direct target engagement.

children.name: Reddit Comment History
children.description: Visualization utility for reviewing Reddit account comment history and timing patterns.
children.bestFor: Comment activity timeline analysis
children.output: Comment history visualizations and posting cadence insights
children.opsecNote: Analyzes publicly accessible Reddit comment data.

children.name: LinkedInt - LinkedIn Recon Tool (T)
children.description: LinkedIn reconnaissance script for enumerating employee profiles and organization-linked data points.
children.bestFor: LinkedIn employee enumeration
children.input: Company names, LinkedIn URLs, and search targets
children.output: Employee profile lists and organization intelligence leads
children.opsecNote: Automated LinkedIn collection can violate platform policy and trigger detection.

children.name: ScrapedIn (T)
children.description: Open-source LinkedIn scraping utility for extracting profile and contact-style data from search results.
children.bestFor: LinkedIn profile data extraction
children.input: LinkedIn search queries and profile targets
children.output: Structured profile records and contact-oriented datasets
children.opsecNote: Scraping traffic and automated behavior are detectable by LinkedIn controls.

children.name: InSpy (T)
children.description: LinkedIn-focused reconnaissance tool that combines profile discovery with email pattern generation.
children.bestFor: Employee and email pattern discovery
children.output: Employee candidates with associated role and email pattern hints
children.opsecNote: Enumeration and enrichment workflows can expose investigator infrastructure.

children.name: raven (T)
children.description: LinkedIn information gathering utility for automated employee enumeration and role filtering.
children.bestFor: Automated LinkedIn org mapping
children.output: Enumerated employee records and role-based lists
children.opsecNote: Automated platform queries can be rate-limited or flagged.

children.name: TikTok (M)
children.description: Manual TikTok profile URL pattern for direct lookup of public account pages.
children.bestFor: Fast manual TikTok profile checks
children.input: TikTok username inserted into the URL
children.output: Public profile page with videos, bio, and engagement counts
children.opsecNote: Direct visits are observable by platform infrastructure; use caution when logged in.

children.name: TikTok-OSINT (T)
children.description: Python tool for extracting TikTok profile metadata and video-linked OSINT artifacts.
children.bestFor: Automated TikTok metadata collection
children.output: Profile metadata, video details, and engagement-related fields
children.opsecNote: Automated requests can trigger anti-abuse controls and rate limits.

children.name: Unfurl
children.description: Forensic parser that extracts and visualizes metadata components embedded in URLs.
children.bestFor: URL parameter and metadata forensics
children.output: Parsed components, decoded values, and relationship visualizations
children.opsecNote: Local analysis mode avoids contacting target platforms during parsing.

children.name: yt-dlp (T)
children.description: Actively maintained command-line downloader for collecting video content and metadata from many platforms.
children.bestFor: Video evidence preservation and metadata export
children.output: Media files, JSON metadata, thumbnails, subtitles, and related artifacts
children.opsecNote: Direct content fetch requests expose investigator network identifiers.

children.name: Treeverse (T)
children.description: Thread visualization tool for exploring conversation trees on supported social platforms.
children.bestFor: Conversation structure mapping
children.output: Hierarchical thread trees with participant and reply context
children.opsecNote: Public-content visualization without direct target interaction.

children.name: Bellingcat Meta Content Library
children.description: Guide to Meta Content Library access for researching public Facebook, Instagram, and Threads content.
children.bestFor: Meta platform archive research for eligible organizations
children.input: Approved research queries and archive search filters
children.output: Searchable public-content archive results and metadata
children.opsecNote: Archive-centric workflow with eligibility gate; no direct account engagement.

children.name: Threads Dashboard
children.description: Analytics and insights platform for Threads accounts using the official API. Tracks audience demographics, engagement metrics, and historical posting data.
children.bestFor: Threads account analytics and engagement investigation
children.output: Audience demographics, engagement rates, posting frequency, optimal posting times, and historical data
children.opsecNote: Retrieves data via Meta's official Threads API; no direct contact with the target account.

children.name: Threads-Scraper (T)
children.description: Python browser automation tool that scrapes public Threads posts and profiles without authentication, outputting structured data in JSON, CSV, or XML. Last updated July 2023.
children.bestFor: Bulk extraction of Threads posts for offline analysis
children.input: Threads profile URL or post URL
children.output: Extracted posts in JSON, CSV, or XML format with metadata
children.opsecNote: Scrapes Threads directly; depends on site structure and may trigger rate limiting.

children.name: ThreadsRecon (T)
children.description: Python OSINT tool for Threads profile analysis including sentiment analysis, network visualization, and automated PDF reporting.
children.bestFor: Threads profile investigation with sentiment and network analysis
children.output: Profile analysis, sentiment scores, network graphs, and PDF investigation reports
children.opsecNote: Makes direct requests to Threads to collect profile and post data for analysis.

children.name: SteamOSINT (T)
children.description: Python tool for OSINT on Steam user profiles. Collects public profile data including games owned, achievements, playtime, and trade history.
children.bestFor: Steam account investigation and user profile analysis
children.output: User profile details, games library, playtime, achievements, trade history, and public friend lists
children.opsecNote: Queries Steam's public API and web interface; requests are visible in Steam community logs.

children.name: Ask FM
children.description: Q&A social network where users answer anonymous and public questions. Supports direct profile lookup via URL manipulation.
children.bestFor: Finding Ask FM profiles by username
children.output: Public profile, Q&A history, followers, and profile metadata
children.opsecNote: Standard web request to Ask FM public profile; profile views are not logged to target users.

children.name: Myspace
children.description: Legacy social network originally used for profile sharing. Still operational with archived data, music discovery, and profile search capabilities.
children.bestFor: Searching for archived Myspace profiles and historical social media data
children.output: User profiles, music collections, photos, and social connections from active and archived accounts
children.opsecNote: Queries Myspace's public search; profile views are not tracked or visible to users.

children.name: Tumblr
children.description: Blogging and social network platform with tagging system. Supports keyword and tag-based content search.
children.bestFor: Finding content and user profiles by tag or keyword across Tumblr
children.output: Public posts, blog content, hashtags, user profiles, and engagement data
children.opsecNote: Searches public content through Tumblr's search interface; searches are not attributed to specific users.

children.name: BlackPlanet.com - Member Find
children.description: Dedicated member search tool for BlackPlanet, a social network primarily serving the African-American community. Supports direct user lookup.
children.bestFor: Finding BlackPlanet user profiles by username or criteria
children.input: Username, email, or profile search criteria
children.output: User profiles, profile metadata, photos, and social connections
children.opsecNote: Uses BlackPlanet's public member search; no authentication required and searches are anonymous.

children.name: MiGente (Latino)
children.description: Legacy social network for Latino communities with archived profiles. May require login or have limited accessibility.
children.bestFor: Searching archived MiGente profiles
children.output: User profiles, photos, and social data from the MiGente platform
children.opsecNote: Limited public access; some content requires authentication to view.

children.name: Asian Avenue
children.description: Former social network for Asian communities, now redirects to BlackPlanet. Archived historical data may still be searchable.
children.bestFor: Searching archived Asian Avenue profile data
children.output: Historical profile data, if available in BlackPlanet archives
children.opsecNote: Site now redirects to BlackPlanet; original Asian Avenue functionality is no longer available.

children.name: Orkut (Brazil)
children.description: Former Google social network that shut down in September 2014. URL now returns error. Historical archives may exist on the Wayback Machine.
children.bestFor: Accessing archived Orkut profiles via Wayback Machine
children.input: Username or profile ID (via Wayback Machine)
children.output: Archived profile pages, photos, and social network data from historical snapshots
children.opsecNote: Live service is no longer available; historical data accessible only through web archives.

children.name: Odnoklassniki
children.description: Russian social network with millions of users. Supports direct user search by username and profile lookup.
children.bestFor: Finding Russian-speaking users and investigating Odnoklassniki profiles
children.output: User profiles, profile photos, mutual friends, groups, and public activity data
children.opsecNote: Queries Odnoklassniki's servers directly; public profile views may be logged. Uses Russian-language interface by default.

children.name: VK
children.description: Largest Russian-language social network with features similar to Facebook. Supports user search and direct profile access.
children.bestFor: Finding Russian and Eastern European users and profile investigation
children.input: Username, profile URL, or search criteria
children.output: User profiles, profile photos, friend lists, wall posts, groups, and activity data
children.opsecNote: Queries VK servers directly; profile views and interactions are logged. Primarily Russian-language interface.

children.name: Delicious
children.description: Social bookmarking platform where users share and discover web links with tags. Supports user profile and bookmark search.
children.bestFor: Finding user bookmarking profiles and discovering curated link collections
children.output: User profiles, bookmarked links, tags, collections, and user activity
children.opsecNote: Searches public bookmarks and user profiles; searches do not interact with or notify individual users.

children.name: TheHoodUp (NSFW)
children.description: Urban community forum and message board with discussion threads, media sharing, and user profiles. Contains NSFW content.
children.bestFor: Searching forum posts, user profiles, and discussions on TheHoodUp community board
children.output: Forum posts, user profiles, discussion threads, and media content
children.opsecNote: Standard web request to public forum; browsing does not require an account for most content.

children.name: Share Secret Feedback (M)
children.description: Anonymous feedback and messaging platform where users collect candid messages from friends and coworkers. Supports 30+ languages and integrates with WhatsApp, Instagram, Snapchat, and Twitter.
children.bestFor: Looking up Secreto profiles by username to find anonymous feedback pages
children.output: Public profile page and shareable feedback link for the target user
children.opsecNote: Viewing a public Secreto profile page is a standard web request; does not notify the profile owner.

children.name: Social Searcher
children.description: Multi-platform social media search engine aggregating content from Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Tumblr, and other networks. Supports real-time and historical search.
children.bestFor: Cross-platform social media content search
children.output: Posts, profiles, hashtags, and metadata from multiple social networks
children.opsecNote: Searches through Social Searcher's aggregated index; does not make direct requests to target accounts.

children.name: Google Social Search
children.description: Google-powered social media search using advanced operators. Provided through Social Searcher's integration.
children.bestFor: Advanced social media search using Google operators
children.input: Google search operators + social media keywords
children.output: Indexed social media content, profiles, and posts from Google's index
children.opsecNote: Uses Google search index; no direct contact with target accounts.

children.name: Talkwalker Social Media Search (R)
children.description: Enterprise social media monitoring and search platform. Tracks mentions across social networks, forums, and news sources with sentiment analysis.
children.bestFor: Enterprise-grade social media monitoring and trend analysis
children.output: Mentions, sentiment scores, influencer data, campaign metrics, and trending insights
children.opsecNote: Searches aggregated social data; registration required for full features.

children.name: PinGroupie
children.description: Pinterest group analysis and discovery tool. Tracks Pinterest user statistics, board content, and group discussions.
children.bestFor: Pinterest user and board analysis
children.output: User profiles, board statistics, pin collections, followers, and engagement data
children.opsecNote: Queries Pinterest's public data; does not require authentication or notify target users.

children.name: Comms Analyzer Toolbox (T)
children.description: Open-source toolkit for forensic analysis of communication archives with Elasticsearch/Kibana dashboards for message timelines and pattern analysis.
children.bestFor: Email/SMS chat archive forensics and timeline analysis
children.input: Communication exports and structured message datasets
children.output: Searchable communication records, timelines, and analytics dashboards
children.opsecNote: Performs local analysis on collected datasets and does not contact targets by default.

children.name: Disboard
children.description: Public Discord server discovery platform used to find communities by topic, language, and popularity.
children.bestFor: Discovering public Discord communities and server metadata
children.output: Indexed public Discord server listings with invite links and tags
children.opsecNote: Searches are performed against Disboard listings; browsing does not interact with target users directly.

children.name: DiscordOSINT (T)
children.description: GitHub repository of Discord investigation techniques, queries, and tooling references for OSINT workflows.
children.bestFor: Learning Discord investigation methods and toolchains
children.input: Manual review of documentation and linked resources
children.output: Investigation guidance, resource links, and workflow references
children.opsecNote: Reference material only; OPSEC depends on which downstream tools are executed.

children.name: Awesome OSINT
children.description: Large curated OSINT resource list covering investigation tools, techniques, and training references.
children.bestFor: Broad OSINT tool discovery and methodology reference
children.output: Categorized links to OSINT tools and learning resources
children.opsecNote: Reference index only; OPSEC depends on the external resources selected.

children.name: OSINT Industries
children.description: Commercial OSINT investigation platform focused on account attribution and cross-platform identity correlation.
children.bestFor: Enterprise-grade identity enrichment and account correlation
children.input: Email addresses, usernames, phone numbers, and account identifiers
children.output: Correlated identity intelligence and linked platform account results
children.opsecNote: Lookups run through the provider platform; no direct contact with targets is required for standard queries.

children.name: SlackPirate (T)
children.description: Security testing tool for Slack workspaces that enumerates channels and extracts accessible messages/files from authenticated sessions.
children.bestFor: Slack workspace enumeration and sensitive data exposure assessment
children.input: Authenticated Slack session/token and workspace target
children.output: Channel/user inventory and extracted accessible Slack content
children.opsecNote: Interacts directly with Slack workspace APIs and can leave observable request activity.

children.name: slack-intelbot (T)
children.description: Slack bot that enriches indicators such as domains, IPs, and hashes by querying external threat intelligence services.
children.bestFor: In-channel IOC enrichment for threat intelligence triage
children.input: Indicators posted in Slack and configured API credentials
children.output: Automated enrichment responses with indicator context and reputation data
children.opsecNote: Queries third-party intelligence APIs; no direct interaction with investigation targets by default.

children.name: slack-web-scraper (T)
children.description: Automation script for collecting Slack channel history and metadata from accessible workspaces.
children.bestFor: Archiving Slack channel content for offline analysis
children.output: Scraped channel messages and related metadata exports
children.opsecNote: Direct scraping activity against Slack endpoints may be logged and rate-limited.

children.name: Google CSE for Telegram links
children.description: Preconfigured Google Custom Search Engine focused on public Telegram links and channel discovery.
children.bestFor: Finding public Telegram channels and groups by keyword
children.output: Google CSE results linking to public Telegram resources
children.opsecNote: Queries are sent to Google CSE rather than directly to Telegram services.

children.name: Telegago (T)
children.description: Telegram-focused search interface built on Google CSE to discover public channels, groups, and related pages.
children.bestFor: Keyword discovery across publicly indexed Telegram content
children.output: Search results pointing to public Telegram channels and posts
children.opsecNote: Uses indexed search results and does not require direct interaction with target accounts.

children.name: Telegram-OSINT (T)
children.description: Curated Telegram OSINT repository linking tools, techniques, and investigative references.
children.bestFor: Sourcing Telegram-specific tooling and investigative playbooks
children.input: Manual review of listed tools and references
children.output: Collection of Telegram OSINT resources and workflows
children.opsecNote: Reference repository only; OPSEC depends on the selected downstream tools.

children.name: TGStat
children.description: Telegram analytics platform indexing public channels and chats with growth, engagement, and content metrics.
children.bestFor: Telegram channel trend analysis and engagement benchmarking
children.input: Channel names, keywords, and Telegram entity identifiers
children.output: Audience metrics, posting statistics, and channel ranking insights
children.opsecNote: Reads TGStat indexed analytics data; no direct contact with targets for normal lookups.

children.name: Tosint (T)
children.description: Telegram OSINT script for profiling bots, extracting public metadata, and correlating related infrastructure clues.
children.bestFor: Telegram bot reconnaissance and metadata extraction
children.input: Telegram bot usernames, links, or identifiers
children.output: Extracted bot metadata, discovery artifacts, and investigation leads
children.opsecNote: Performs direct queries to Telegram services for target resolution and metadata retrieval.

children.name: Sogou WeChat Search
children.description: Chinese search portal indexing publicly accessible WeChat articles and official account content.
children.bestFor: Discovering public WeChat posts and organization presence
children.input: Chinese keywords, account names, or article titles
children.output: Indexed WeChat article pages and related account search results
children.opsecNote: Queries Sogou index results and does not require direct access to target accounts.

children.name: WechatSogou (T)
children.description: Python package for automating Sogou WeChat searches and parsing returned article/account results.
children.bestFor: Automating batch WeChat article and account discovery
children.output: Parsed WeChat article and account metadata from Sogou results
children.opsecNote: Automates queries to Sogou search endpoints; no direct messaging-platform interaction with target users.

children.name: wechat-dump (T)
children.description: Tool for exporting WeChat chat data from rooted Android devices for forensic examination and recovery.
children.bestFor: Authorized mobile WeChat chat history extraction and preservation
children.input: Rooted Android device data and WeChat app storage
children.output: Extracted local WeChat message databases and media artifacts
children.opsecNote: Operates on local device data and does not require contacting external targets.

children.name: wechat-text-backup (T)
children.description: WeChat database decryption and backup utility for exporting local message history into readable text formats.
children.bestFor: Decrypting and backing up local WeChat message archives
children.input: Local WeChat database files and decryption context
children.output: Decrypted, readable WeChat chat history exports
children.opsecNote: Performs direct decryption and extraction actions against local account data stores.

children.name: linelog2py (T)
children.description: Python parser for processing exported LINE chat logs into structured records for analysis.
children.bestFor: Converting LINE chat exports for downstream analysis workflows
children.output: Structured parsed LINE messages and conversation artifacts
children.opsecNote: Processes local chat export files without contacting target services.

children.name: line-message-analyzer (T)
children.description: Local analysis utility for LINE chat exports that computes message statistics and conversational activity patterns.
children.bestFor: LINE conversation frequency and behavior analysis
children.output: Message analytics, usage trends, and conversation summaries
children.opsecNote: Runs locally on exported chat data and does not directly query target accounts.

children.name: Email2WhatsApp (T)
children.description: OSINT utility for correlating email addresses to potential WhatsApp identifiers and account traces.
children.bestFor: Email-to-WhatsApp account correlation during profiling
children.output: Potential linked WhatsApp account indicators and correlation results
children.opsecNote: Primarily performs correlation lookups without messaging target accounts directly.

children.name: WhatsApp-OSINT (T)
children.description: WhatsApp reconnaissance toolchain using API-backed lookups for account and device-related intelligence collection.
children.bestFor: Rapid WhatsApp account reconnaissance and metadata checks
children.input: Phone numbers or WhatsApp account identifiers
children.output: Enriched account metadata and reconnaissance results
children.opsecNote: Direct API-driven lookups against messaging infrastructure may be logged by providers.

children.name: InfoFlow Public People Search In Chilean
children.description: Chilean public records lookup service for vehicle registrations, personal ID numbers (RUN), company information, and reverse name-to-RUN lookups via web portal, WhatsApp, or Telegram.
children.bestFor: Chilean public records and identity verification
children.input: Name, RUN (Chilean ID number), or vehicle plate
children.output: Personal identification data, vehicle registration, company records
children.opsecNote: Requires registration with Chilean RUT; queries may be logged.

children.name: ThatsThem
children.description: Free people search engine with 2.2 billion indexed names. Provides reverse phone, email, address, and IP lookups alongside standard name searches.
children.bestFor: Quick free people lookups by name, address, phone, email, or IP
children.input: Name, address, phone number, email, or IP address
children.output: Contact details, associated addresses, phone numbers, email addresses
children.opsecNote: Free tier has daily lookup limits; no account required for basic searches.

children.name: Melissa Data - People Finder (R)
children.description: Enterprise data quality and identity verification platform offering people search, address verification, phone append, and email verification across global datasets.
children.bestFor: Enterprise-grade identity verification and data enrichment
children.output: Verified contact data, address standardization, identity confirmation
children.opsecNote: Enterprise service; queries logged and usage tracked under account.

children.name: PeekYou
children.description: Free people search engine indexing over 300 million profiles. Aggregates social media accounts, public records, and web presence into unified profiles.
children.bestFor: Finding social media profiles and web presence by name
children.input: Name and optional location, or username
children.output: Aggregated social media profiles, contact information, web presence
children.opsecNote: No registration required; all searches use public data.

children.name: Webmii
children.description: Free people search engine that calculates a web visibility score based on online presence across social networks, news, and web pages.
children.bestFor: Assessing online visibility and web footprint
children.output: Web visibility score, social profiles, images, videos, news mentions
children.opsecNote: No registration required; searches public web data only.

children.name: Snitch.name
children.description: People profile search engine checking approximately 40 social networks including Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, Xing, and government databases.
children.bestFor: Cross-platform social media profile discovery
children.output: Social media profiles across ~40 platforms
children.opsecNote: SSL certificate expired; browsers will show security warnings.

children.name: Lullar
children.description: Free people search tool that checks 148+ social media platforms for matching profiles by email or username. No sign-up or payment required.
children.bestFor: Username and email-based social media profile enumeration
children.output: Matching profiles across 148+ social media platforms
children.opsecNote: No registration required; searches public profiles only.

children.name: Yasni
children.description: Free people search engine allowing searches by name, location, profession, company, or skills. Also offers professional Expose profile pages.
children.bestFor: Name-based people search with professional context
children.input: Name, location, profession, company, or skills
children.output: Aggregated web presence, professional profiles, contact information
children.opsecNote: No registration for searches; account needed for profile creation features.

children.name: findmypast.com
children.description: UK-focused genealogy and historical records platform with billions of records covering census, birth, marriage, death, military, and immigration documents.
children.bestFor: UK and Irish genealogy and historical records research

children.description: Elsevier's platform for peer-reviewed scientific literature with access to over 2,900 journals and 30,000 e-books; freely searchable with full-text access requiring subscription or institutional access.
children.bestFor: Scientific and technical literature search across Elsevier's extensive journal catalog
children.input: Author, title, keyword, DOI, or journal name
children.output: Article records with abstracts; full text requires subscription or per-article purchase
children.opsecNote: Searches are logged by Elsevier; institutional access requires login which creates an activity record.

children.name: Think Tank Search
children.description: Harvard Kennedy School Library guide for searching think tank research and policy reports; the referenced Think Tank Search service was deprecated in February 2025.
children.bestFor: Policy research and think tank report discovery (see Policy Commons as current alternative)
children.output: Links to think tank research guides and policy report databases
children.opsecNote: Accesses a public library guide page; no tracking beyond standard web server logs.

children.name: Library Databases
children.description: University of Florida Library's A-Z database directory providing access to hundreds of academic databases covering all disciplines; useful as a reference for locating specialized research databases.
children.bestFor: Identifying specialized academic databases by subject for deep literature research
children.output: List of academic databases with descriptions and access links
children.opsecNote: Public library guide; no account required for browsing the directory.

children.name: Copyscape Plagiarism Checker
children.description: Online plagiarism detection service that searches the web for copies of submitted text or URLs; useful for verifying content originality or tracing where text has been republished.
children.bestFor: Detecting plagiarism and tracing where specific text or content has been copied or republished online
children.output: List of web pages containing matching or similar text with percentage match scores
children.opsecNote: Searches are processed by Copyscape's servers; submitted text is sent to Copyscape for comparison.

children.name: Lazy Scholar (T)
children.description: Browser extension that automatically finds free legal full-text versions of academic papers when viewing paywalled content; checks open-access repositories and PubMed Central.
children.bestFor: Finding free full-text access to paywalled academic papers without institutional subscription
children.input: Paywalled journal article URL or DOI (via browser extension)
children.output: Links to free legal full-text versions of the paper from open-access sources
children.opsecNote: Extension queries open-access databases in the background; no personal data sent to external servers.

children.name: Open Access Scholarly Journals
children.description: PAGEPress open-access publisher hosting peer-reviewed journals across biomedical, natural, and social sciences; provides free access to published research articles.
children.bestFor: Accessing open-access peer-reviewed research in biomedical and natural sciences
children.input: Article title, author, or journal name
children.output: Freely accessible full-text research articles in PDF and HTML formats
children.opsecNote: Publicly accessible journal platform; no account required to read articles.

children.name: pagodo - Passive Google Dork (T)
children.description: Python CLI tool that automates passive Google dork searches using the Google Hacking Database (GHDB), supporting HTTP/SOCKS5 proxies to avoid rate-limiting.
children.bestFor: Automated passive Google dork enumeration from GHDB
children.output: Google search result URLs matching dork patterns
children.opsecNote: Queries public Google search only; supports proxy configuration to reduce exposure. No direct target system contact.

children.name: Google Trends
children.description: Google's free tool for analyzing search interest trends over time and by geography, providing anonymized and aggregated data.
children.bestFor: Tracking topic interest, comparing search terms, identifying trend patterns
children.output: Trend graphs, regional interest data, related queries
children.opsecNote: Queries Google's anonymized aggregated data; no personal data exposure and no direct target contact.

children.name: dorksearch.com
children.description: Web-based Google dork builder and search tool that integrates with Shodan, Censys, and GitHub for comprehensive OSINT searches.
children.bestFor: Building complex Google dorks with API cross-referencing
children.output: Google search queries with optional Shodan/Censys/GitHub results
children.opsecNote: Constructs and executes Google dork queries; API integrations may send queries to third-party services.

children.name: dorkgenerator.pages.dev
children.description: Online dork generator for creating custom Google search parameter queries to assist in OSINT and security research.
children.bestFor: Quick generation of custom Google dork queries
children.output: Constructed Google dork search URL
children.opsecNote: Generates query strings locally; executing the dork in Google is passive public search.

children.name: dorksearch.netlify.app
children.description: Lightweight web interface for building and executing Google dork searches with minimal dependencies.
children.bestFor: Fast, simple Google dork query generation
children.output: Google dork search URL
children.opsecNote: Generates and redirects to Google search queries; passive public search only.

children.name: Google Hacking Database
children.description: Offensive Security's curated database of Google dork queries, organized by category, used for finding sensitive information exposed on the web.
children.bestFor: Finding proven dork queries by category for security research
children.input: Category or keyword search within GHDB
children.output: Curated Google dork queries with descriptions
children.opsecNote: Reference database only; executing dorks against Google is passive public search with no direct target contact.

children.name: Google Search Operators Guide
children.description: Official Google documentation covering all supported search operators, syntax, and advanced search techniques.
children.bestFor: Reference for Google search operator syntax and capabilities
children.output: Documentation on operators, syntax, and examples
children.opsecNote: Static reference documentation; no data is submitted or queries executed.

children.name: Google Guide Cheat Sheet
children.description: Quick-reference cheat sheet for Google search operators and advanced search syntax from Google Guide.
children.bestFor: Quick lookup of Google search operator syntax
children.output: Tabular reference of operators with examples
children.opsecNote: Static reference page; no queries executed or data submitted.

children.name: Live Journal Seek
children.description: Search tool for LiveJournal journals and communities across public entries that are indexed.
children.bestFor: Finding public LiveJournal entries and historical community discussions
children.output: Matching journal entries with author, date, and snippets
children.opsecNote: Searches publicly indexed content and does not contact journal owners directly; queries are likely logged.

children.name: Blog Search Engine

children.name: Discord Bot List

children.name: Top.gg

children.name: Craigslist Forums

children.name: Google Groups Search

children.name: Mibbit

children.name: IRCP (T)
children.description: Python-based IRC probing utility for scanning servers and collecting network/channel metadata.

children.name: ircsnapshot (T)

children.name: netsplit.de

children.opsecNote: Uses aggregated indexed IRC data and does not require direct IRC server interaction for searches.

children.name: Arctic Shift
children.description: Search and access layer for Reddit datasets with tools for historical content retrieval and analysis.
children.bestFor: Historical Reddit dataset analysis and subreddit research

children.opsecNote: Works against archived or indexed data sources without requiring direct engagement with target accounts.

children.name: Cama's Reddit Search
children.description: Web tool for searching Reddit posts and comments by author, subreddit, text, and time filters.

children.name: Reveddit

children.name: Anna's Archive

children.name: Archive.is

children.name: Browsershots
children.description: Legacy cross-browser screenshot service historically used to render pages in multiple browser/OS combinations.

children.name: Cached Pages
children.description: Web cache lookup utility that surfaces archived and cached versions of a target page from multiple sources.

children.name: Cached View
children.description: Simple cache-checking service that retrieves copies of pages from search engine and archive caches.

children.name: Common Crawl
children.description: Open repository of large-scale web crawl data published as monthly WARC datasets.

children.name: Internet Archive: Wayback Machine

children.name: PDF My URL

children.name: Screenshots.com

children.name: Wayback Machine Chrome Extension
children.description: Browser extension that detects missing pages and loads historical versions from the Wayback Machine.

children.name: Textfiles.com

children.name: UK Web Archive
children.description: British Library-led archive preserving selected UK websites and related national web heritage content.

children.output: Archived UK website records and preserved snapshots

children.name: Waybackpack (T)
children.description: Command-line tool for bulk downloading archived captures from the Internet Archive Wayback Machine.

children.name: Web Archive-RU
children.description: Regional web archiving service focused on preserving and browsing snapshots of selected websites.

children.opsecNote: Operational status requires follow-up verification; use as secondary source until confirmed.

children.name: WebCite
children.description: Citation-focused web preservation service with legacy archived records and limited query capabilities.
children.bestFor: Retrieving historical citation captures that still remain accessible
children.input: Archived URL, DOI, or query string
children.output: Stored citation snapshots and metadata records
children.opsecNote: Service appears read-only and partially unavailable; expect incomplete retrieval.

children.name: Cryptome
children.description: Long-running disclosure archive hosting leaked or hard-to-find government, intelligence, and policy documents.
children.bestFor: Searching historical leaked documents and primary-source disclosures

children.name: Databases.Today
children.description: Breach data discovery portal indexing exposed databases and leaked credential collections.
children.bestFor: Identifying whether target identifiers appear in known breach dumps
children.output: Indexed breach hit results and source references

children.name: WikiLeaks
children.description: Global document leak publication platform containing diplomatic, military, and corporate disclosures.
children.bestFor: Searching high-impact leaked document collections for historical context

children.output: Leaked document pages, files, and related publication context

children.name: Stanford Large Network Dataset Collection

children.name: Overview
children.description: Self-hosted document analysis and management platform for investigating large document collections through search, tagging, and plugin-based analysis with full data privacy.
children.bestFor: Large-scale document analysis, investigative research, institutional document management
children.input: Document uploads (supports large collections), project-based organization, multi-user
children.output: Searchable document database, tagged collections, word clouds, entity filtering
children.opsecNote: Self-hosted solution; complete data control; no external transmission required

children.name: Online Nikto scanner
children.description: Web-based vulnerability scanner that identifies potential security misconfigurations, outdated software, and vulnerabilities in web servers without requiring local installation.
children.bestFor: Web server vulnerability scanning, security assessment, SSL/TLS validation
children.input: Website URLs or domain names; configurable scan types
children.output: Vulnerability reports, CVE matching, server identification data, HTTP header analysis
children.opsecNote: Active vulnerability scanning; generates logs on target systems; creates measurable network activity

children.name: AI or Not
children.description: AI content detection tool that analyzes images and audio to determine whether they were generated by AI or created by humans.
children.bestFor: Detecting AI-generated images and audio in disinformation investigations and media verification
children.input: Image file or URL, audio file
children.output: AI vs. human classification score with confidence percentage
children.opsecNote: Files are uploaded to a third-party server for analysis; avoid submitting sensitive operational images.

children.name: Copyleaks
children.description: Plagiarism and AI-generated content detection platform that checks text against web sources and AI writing patterns across multiple languages.
children.bestFor: Detecting AI-written reports, verifying authenticity of documents, plagiarism analysis
children.output: Plagiarism percentage, AI content probability, and matched source links
children.opsecNote: Submitted text is processed and stored on third-party servers; use caution with sensitive content.

children.name: Decopy AI Image Detector
children.description: AI image detection tool that analyzes photographs and graphics to identify signatures of AI generation from models like Midjourney, DALL-E, and Stable Diffusion.
children.bestFor: Detecting AI-generated profile photos, fake news images, and synthetic media
children.output: AI generation probability score with model identification hints
children.opsecNote: Images are uploaded to third-party servers for analysis; avoid submitting operationally sensitive images.

children.name: DeepAI AI Image Detector
children.description: DeepAI's image authenticity classifier that detects whether an image was generated by an AI model or captured by a camera.
children.bestFor: AI-generated image detection, media verification in OSINT investigations
children.output: AI likelihood score and classification result
children.opsecNote: Image content is submitted to DeepAI servers; use with non-sensitive imagery.

children.name: DeepSeek
children.description: Chinese open-source large language model and chat assistant offering competitive reasoning capabilities with free access for research and analysis tasks.
children.bestFor: Document summarization, OSINT data analysis, translation, and pattern identification in collected data
children.output: AI-generated analysis, summaries, translations, and responses
children.opsecNote: Data is processed by servers operated by a Chinese company; do not submit classified, sensitive, or personally identifiable investigation data.

children.name: DocMind AI
children.description: Open-source local LLM-powered document analysis tool for querying and summarizing documents using locally running language models via LangChain.
children.bestFor: Private document analysis, querying sensitive documents without cloud exposure
children.output: LLM-generated summaries, Q&A responses, and extracted insights from documents
children.opsecNote: Runs entirely locally; no data is sent to external servers, making it suitable for sensitive document analysis.

children.name: DuckDuckGo AI Chat
children.description: Privacy-focused AI chat interface by DuckDuckGo that proxies conversations through multiple LLMs without tying them to user identity or storing them.
children.bestFor: Privacy-preserving AI assistance for OSINT tasks, anonymous LLM queries
children.output: AI-generated responses with privacy protections in place
children.opsecNote: DuckDuckGo proxies requests and does not link them to user accounts; offers better privacy than direct LLM providers.

children.name: GPTZero
children.description: AI text detection tool specifically designed to identify ChatGPT and large language model-generated content with sentence-level granularity.
children.bestFor: Detecting AI-written intelligence reports, academic fraud, and synthetic narrative content
children.output: Overall AI probability score, perplexity/burstiness analysis, and highlighted AI-generated sentences
children.opsecNote: Text is submitted to GPTZero servers; avoid submitting sensitive operational content.

children.name: Grammarly AI Detector
children.description: Grammarly's AI content detection tool that identifies text likely generated by AI writing assistants, with percentage breakdown of human vs. AI content.
children.bestFor: Detecting AI-written content in social media profiles, reports, and messages
children.output: AI vs. human content percentage with highlighted sentences
children.opsecNote: Text is submitted to Grammarly's servers; do not submit confidential investigation content.

children.name: Hive AI Generated Content Detection
children.description: Enterprise-grade AI content detection API from Hive Moderation that detects AI-generated text, images, and video at scale.
children.bestFor: High-volume AI content detection, bulk media verification in large investigation datasets
children.input: Text, image, or video content via API or web demo
children.output: AI generation probability scores for text, image, and video content
children.opsecNote: Content is processed by Hive Moderation servers; API key required for high-volume use.

children.name: Hugging Face AI Detector
children.description: Community-hosted AI text detector on Hugging Face Spaces that classifies text as AI-generated or human-written using open-source models.
children.bestFor: Quick AI text classification using open-source models
children.output: AI vs. human classification probability
children.opsecNote: Hosted on Hugging Face Spaces; availability may vary as community spaces can go offline. Text submitted to their servers.

children.name: Illuminarty
children.description: AI image detection tool that identifies AI-generated images and attempts to identify which AI model was used to create them.
children.bestFor: AI image detection with model attribution, deepfake and synthetic media investigation
children.output: AI generation probability and suspected generating model (Midjourney, DALL-E, SD, etc.)
children.opsecNote: Images uploaded to Illuminarty servers; registration required for full feature access.

children.name: Microsoft Copilot
children.description: Microsoft's AI assistant powered by GPT-4 with web search integration; useful for summarizing open-source intelligence and conducting research tasks.
children.bestFor: OSINT data summarization, research assistance, document drafting with web search context
children.input: Text prompts with optional web search queries
children.output: AI-generated responses with cited web sources and follow-up suggestions
children.opsecNote: Microsoft logs conversation data; do not submit personally identifiable information about investigation subjects or sensitive operational content.

children.name: Ollama
children.description: Local LLM runner that enables privacy-preserving AI inference on personal hardware by downloading and running open-source models like Llama 3, Mistral, and Gemma.
children.bestFor: Private AI analysis of sensitive OSINT data, local document processing without cloud exposure
children.input: Text prompts, documents (via integration), API calls
children.output: LLM-generated responses using locally running open-source models
children.opsecNote: Runs entirely on local hardware; no data leaves your machine. Ideal for sensitive investigations requiring AI analysis.

children.name: OSINT Analyser
children.description: Open-source OSINT data aggregation and AI analysis tool that collects information from multiple sources and uses LLMs to generate intelligence summaries.
children.bestFor: Automated OSINT aggregation with AI-powered analysis and reporting
children.output: Aggregated OSINT data from multiple sources with AI-generated intelligence summary
children.opsecNote: Queries multiple external OSINT sources; active tool that may alert targets depending on configured modules.

children.name: TrueMedia
children.description: AI deepfake detection platform focused on political content that analyzes videos and images for synthetic media manipulation indicators.
children.bestFor: Deepfake detection in political and news media contexts
children.output: Deepfake probability score with analysis of manipulation indicators
children.opsecNote: Site is currently offline; expected to relaunch. Content would be submitted to their servers for analysis.

children.name: WasItAI
children.description: Lightweight AI content detection tool that analyzes text and images to determine if they were created by AI, with a simple interface for quick checks.
children.bestFor: Quick AI content checks for text and images during media verification
children.output: AI-generated probability classification
children.opsecNote: Content submitted to third-party servers for analysis; not suitable for sensitive material.

children.name: World Monitor
children.description: AI-powered geopolitical event monitoring and intelligence platform that tracks global news and events relevant to national security and business risk.
children.bestFor: Geopolitical OSINT, global event monitoring, early warning intelligence gathering
children.input: Topic, region, or entity keywords for monitoring
children.output: Curated news events with AI-generated context, risk scoring, and trend analysis
children.opsecNote: Passive monitoring of publicly available news; queries are submitted to their platform.

children.name: You.com
children.description: AI-powered search engine and assistant that combines web search with LLM-generated responses and source citations for research tasks.
children.bestFor: AI-assisted web research, summarizing search results, multi-source research aggregation
children.output: AI-generated answers with cited web sources, images, news, and follow-up research paths
children.opsecNote: Queries are logged; account required for advanced features. Do not submit sensitive subject information.

children.name: Decalage Malware Search
children.description: Custom metasearch engine that indexes malware analysis databases to find malware samples containing specific strings, filenames, hashes, or IOCs.
children.bestFor: Quick metasearch across multiple malware analysis databases by hash, string, or filename
children.input: IOC (hash, filename, string, yara rule, VT hash)
children.output: Links to malware analysis reports from aggregated databases
children.opsecNote: Search-only interface; no account required; queries are directed to indexed databases

children.name: VirusShare.com
children.description: Repository of 111+ million live malware samples provided for security researchers, incident responders, forensic analysts, and researchers.
children.bestFor: Bulk access to malware sample collections for research and analysis
children.output: Malware sample files (zip archives, password protected), related IOCs
children.opsecNote: Registration required; no direct execution occurs; passive hash lookup available

children.name: #totalhash
children.description: Malware Hash Registry that searches against 30+ antivirus databases to validate malware hashes with detection percentage results. Updated daily.
children.bestFor: Hash validation against 30+ AV engines with detection percentages
children.output: Detection percentage, last seen timestamp, signature matches from AV databases
children.opsecNote: No registration required; read-only hash lookups leave minimal traces

children.name: VX Vault
children.description: Active collection of malware samples and related data shared among security researchers and malware analysts for threat intelligence.
children.bestFor: Access to active malware sample collections
children.input: Web interface browsing, malware sample queries
children.output: Malware sample information, related indicators
children.opsecNote: Web-based browsing interface; no registration typically required

children.name: ID Ransomware
children.description: Free ransomware identification tool that analyzes ransom notes and encrypted file samples to identify variants and provide decryption guidance. Detects 1181+ ransomware types.
children.bestFor: Ransomware identification and victim support
children.input: Ransom note file, encrypted file sample, ransom email address
children.output: Ransomware variant identification, decryption status, victim resources
children.opsecNote: File uploads provide victim privacy options to protect personal data exposure

children.name: National Software Reference Library
children.description: NIST-maintained repository of cryptographic hash values for known, legitimate software to identify known-good files during digital forensics investigations.
children.bestFor: Eliminating known-good files in forensic investigations and digital triage
children.input: File hash (MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256), software query
children.output: Hash matches to known software, file metadata, product versioning
children.opsecNote: No registration required; lookup-only service; government maintained

children.name: TYLabs QuickSand Framework
children.description: Python-based malware analysis framework for analyzing Office documents and PDFs to identify exploits in decoded streams using YARA signatures.
children.bestFor: Document and PDF malware analysis with exploit detection
children.output: YARA signature matches, exploit detection, risk scoring, threat analysis
children.opsecNote: Hosted analysis requires file upload; local installation available for offline use

children.name: JoeSandbox Document Analyzer
children.description: Hosted automated malware analysis service that performs dynamic and static analysis of files including Office documents, PDFs, and executables with comprehensive behavioral reporting.
children.bestFor: Comprehensive malware analysis with behavioral insights and threat scoring
children.input: Executable files, documents, PDFs, URLs, APKs (Max 30MB free tier)
children.output: Behavioral analysis, network IOCs, detection verdicts, MITRE ATT&CK mappings, export formats (JSON, XML, HTML, PDF)
children.opsecNote: File uploads are processed on external sandbox; free tier limited to 30 submissions/month

children.name: TYLabs QuickSand Framework
children.description: Python-based malware analysis framework for analyzing Office documents and PDFs to identify exploits in decoded streams using YARA signatures.
children.bestFor: Document and PDF malware analysis with exploit detection
children.output: YARA signature matches, exploit detection, risk scoring, threat analysis
children.opsecNote: Hosted analysis requires file upload; local installation available for offline use

children.name: Akana Android Malware
children.description: Online Android Interactive Analysis Environment with plugins for analyzing malicious Android applications and APKs for suspicious behavior and malware characteristics.
children.bestFor: Android app malware analysis and interactive examination
children.output: Malware detection results, behavioral analysis, plugin-based threat assessment
children.opsecNote: File uploads required; external analysis service

children.name: Joe APK Analyzer
children.description: Part of Joe Sandbox suite; performs dynamic and static analysis of Android Application Packages to detect malicious behavior and generate detailed analysis reports.
children.bestFor: Android malware analysis with dynamic behavior monitoring
children.output: Malware detection, behavioral analysis, threat intelligence IOCs
children.opsecNote: File uploads to external sandbox; free tier has limitations

children.name: VirusTotal
children.description: Multi-engine file and URL scanner that aggregates results from 70+ antivirus engines and threat feeds.
children.bestFor: Malware analysis, URL reputation, file hash lookups
children.input: File, file hash, URL, domain, IP address
children.output: Detection results, behavioral analysis, community comments, related indicators
children.opsecNote: Uploaded files become visible to other VirusTotal users. Hash lookups are private.

children.name: OPSWAT Meta Defender
children.description: Multi-engine malware scanning service using 20+ antivirus engines with advanced threat analysis, content disarm & reconstruction, and emulation-based detection for zero-day threats.
children.bestFor: Multi-engine malware detection with advanced threat analysis
children.output: Multi-engine scan results, threat verdicts, IOC extraction, file behavior analysis
children.opsecNote: File uploads required; free community version available with API limits

children.name: Hybrid Analysis
children.description: Free automated malware analysis service powered by CrowdStrike Falcon Sandbox. Combines runtime data with memory dump analysis to extract execution pathways and IOCs for evasive malware.
children.bestFor: Advanced malware behavior analysis and evasion detection
children.input: Files (30MB max free tier), URLs, APKs (up to 30 per month free)
children.output: Hybrid behavioral analysis, memory dumps, disassembly, IOC extraction, behavioral indicators
children.opsecNote: Free tier limited to 30 uploads/month; file uploads to external sandbox infrastructure

children.name: Malware Config
children.description: Database for searching and analyzing extracted malware configurations by hash, domain, or IP address to track C2 infrastructure and malware attributes.
children.bestFor: Malware configuration extraction and C2 server tracking
children.input: SHA256 hash, domain, IP address, malware family
children.output: Extracted malware configurations, C2 infrastructure, encrypted keys, command data
children.opsecNote: Search-only interface; no file uploads required; passive lookups

children.name: MetaDefender
children.description: OPSWAT's cloud-based multi-engine malware scanning platform with advanced threat detection using 30+ antivirus engines, CDR technology, and behavioral analysis.
children.bestFor: Enterprise-grade multi-engine malware detection and advanced threat analysis
children.output: Multi-engine detection results, threat verdicts, behavioral analysis, IOC extraction
children.opsecNote: File uploads required; commercial and free tiers available

children.name: Ether
children.description: Georgia Tech malware analysis framework using Intel VT hardware virtualization for transparent, stealthy malware analysis resistant to anti-analysis techniques.
children.bestFor: Transparent malware analysis resistant to anti-analysis evasion
children.output: Fine-grained execution traces, instruction-level analysis, unpacking results, behavior extraction
children.opsecNote: Hosted analysis service; academic research project from Georgia Institute of Technology

children.name: Jotti's Malware Scanner
children.description: Free multi-scanner malware analysis service that submits files for analysis against 14+ antivirus engines. No installation or account setup required.
children.bestFor: Quick multi-engine scan without installation or account setup
children.output: Detection results from 14+ AV engines, file metadata, scan reports
children.opsecNote: No account required; file uploads to external scanning service

children.name: Valkyrie File Analysis
children.description: Cloud-based verdict-driven malware analysis platform from Comodo using static analysis (450+ unpackers), dynamic analysis, and optional human expert analysis for unknown files.
children.bestFor: Advanced malware analysis with human expert review option
children.output: File verdict, behavioral analysis results, IOC extraction, confidence scores, expert analysis
children.opsecNote: File uploads required; expert analysis available for premium users

children.name: detux Linux Sandbox
children.description: Open-source multiplatform Linux sandbox for analyzing Linux malware across multiple CPU architectures (x86, x86-64, ARM, MIPS) using QEMU emulation and traffic analysis.
children.bestFor: Linux malware analysis across multiple architectures
children.output: Static analysis strings, dynamic traffic capture, IOC extraction, architecture-specific analysis
children.opsecNote: Open-source tool; can be deployed locally or used as hosted service

children.name: Joe File Analyzer
children.description: Part of Joe Sandbox suite; performs hybrid code analysis of PE files on Windows with detailed behavioral and system interaction reporting.
children.bestFor: PE file malware analysis with system interaction tracking
children.output: Hybrid behavioral analysis, system calls, network IOCs, threat scores
children.opsecNote: File uploads to Joe Sandbox infrastructure; free tier has submission limits

children.name: Pikker.ee Cuckoo Sandbox
children.description: Public instance of Cuckoo Sandbox malware analysis system hosted in Estonia. Provides automated dynamic analysis with detailed result reporting for submitted files.
children.bestFor: Free automated dynamic malware analysis with detailed behavioral reports
children.output: Process monitoring, API calls, file system changes, network traffic, behavioral analysis
children.opsecNote: Public instance; files uploaded to external infrastructure; Estonian-hosted

children.name: Koodous
children.description: Collaborative platform for Android malware research and analysis with community-driven database of 70+ million Android applications with crowd-sourced malware detection.
children.bestFor: Android malware analysis with community collaboration and threat intelligence
children.input: Android APK files, package names, hashes
children.output: Malware detection results, community analysis, threat indicators, sample sharing
children.opsecNote: Registration available; community platform with shared threat intelligence

children.name: Any Run
children.description: Interactive malware analysis sandbox allowing real-time manual interaction with Windows, macOS, Linux, and Android environments. Fast report generation with MITRE ATT&CK mapping.
children.bestFor: Interactive malware analysis with real-time system interaction
children.output: Process graphs, behavioral analysis, MITRE ATT&CK TTPs, IOCs, customizable reports
children.opsecNote: Interactive analysis leaves traces; free tier limited to 3 public analyses/day; private mode in paid plans

children.name: Uncover It
children.description: Static malware configuration extractor that quickly analyzes files without execution to extract malware configurations, C2 infrastructure, and IOCs in under 5 seconds.
children.bestFor: Fast static malware configuration extraction
children.output: Extracted configurations, C2 servers, encryption keys, behavioral indicators
children.opsecNote: Static analysis only; no code execution; quick analysis without external dependencies

children.name: Office Mal Scanner (T)
children.description: Malicious Office document analysis tool for analyzing and reconstructing Office documents to identify exploits and malicious content.
children.bestFor: Malicious Office document analysis and reconstruction
children.output: Document structure analysis, malicious content extraction, exploit identification
children.opsecNote: Document upload required; analysis service online

children.name: OffVis (T)
children.description: Microsoft Office Visualization Tool for analyzing Office binary files to identify exploits and malicious structures. Displays hex and object tree views.
children.bestFor: Office binary file format analysis and exploit detection
children.output: File structure visualization, hex dump, object trees, vulnerability detection
children.opsecNote: Local desktop application; no file uploads; Microsoft-provided tool

children.name: PDF Tools (T)
children.description: Free suite of PDF analysis tools by Didier Stevens including pdfid (keyword scanning) and pdf-parser.py for analyzing malicious PDF documents and extracting embedded objects.
children.bestFor: PDF structure analysis and malicious object extraction
children.output: PDF keyword identification, object parsing, embedded JavaScript detection, IOC extraction
children.opsecNote: Command-line tools; local execution; open-source from reputable security researcher

children.name: Origami Framework (T)
children.description: Ruby framework for parsing, analyzing, and forging PDF documents. Includes PDF Walker GUI and PDFcop heuristic checker for detecting dangerous PDF content.
children.bestFor: PDF parsing and manipulation for malicious PDF analysis
children.input: PDF files, PDF objects, malicious content
children.output: Parsed PDF structure, extracted objects, deobfuscated content, modified PDFs
children.opsecNote: Open-source framework; local installation required; no file uploads

children.name: Malware-Traffic-Analysis.net
children.description: Training resource and PCAP repository providing network traffic captures from malware infections since 2013. Includes tutorials and exercises for malware traffic analysis.
children.bestFor: Malware network behavior analysis and training exercises
children.output: Network indicators (IPs, domains, C2 servers), behavioral analysis, post-exploitation patterns
children.opsecNote: PCAP analysis is passive; no live malware execution; educational resource

children.name: Ghidra (T)
children.description: Free and open-source reverse engineering framework from NSA for analyzing compiled software. Includes disassembly, decompilation, scripting, and interactive graphing for malware analysis.
children.bestFor: Reverse engineering and static malware analysis
children.input: Executable files (ELF, PE, Mach-O, raw binaries), multiple architectures
children.output: Disassembly, decompiled code, control flow graphs, function analysis, custom scripts
children.opsecNote: Local desktop application; no file uploads; open-source from NSA

children.name: Malware Analysis Tools
children.description: Curated resource and reference guide for malware analysis tools with recommendations for virtualization, safety practices, and tool selection for analysis scenarios.
children.bestFor: Malware analysis tool discovery and best practices reference
children.output: Tool recommendations, analysis methodologies, safety practices, learning resources
children.opsecNote: Reference resource only; no file uploads or active analysis

children.name: virustotal
children.description: Free online service that analyzes files and URLs for viruses, trojans and malicious content detected by 70+ antivirus engines and URL/domain reputation services.
children.bestFor: Multi-engine malware scanning and URL reputation lookup
children.input: Files, URLs, domains, IP addresses, file hashes
children.output: Detection results from 70+ AV engines, behavioral analysis, file insights, related samples
children.opsecNote: File uploads are indexed and visible to other users; hash-only queries are private

children.name: Vulert: Updated Open Source Vulnerability Database
ImmuniWeb

children.output: Vulnerability reports and risk assessment

children.bestFor: IP threat tracking
